Name: SWAPS CONSULTING
Description:
Créée en 2000, la société Swaps a été dans un premier temps un contractant général, bien que l’objet initial fût plutôt la constitution d’une base de données de type techniciens et agents du bâtiment.

En d’autres termes, il s’agissait de créer sur le principe d’une agence d’interim, une offre qui puisse répondre aux saisonnalités propres des entreprises du secteur btp.

Une expérience précédente d’entreprise générale du bâtiment avec un carnet de commandes en dents de scies avait mis en évidence des phases d’excès puis de manques en personnel exécutant.
Le principe était donc de proposer par l’accès à la base de données, d’y inscrire du personnel ponctuellement sous-employé pour répondre à l’inverse à un déficit de main d’œuvre, sans devoir utiliser le principe de la sous-traitance. Il s’agissait en d’autres termes d’une mutualisation des compétences humaines.
Le principe pouvait être décliné à d’autres secteurs d’activité.

Toutefois ce principe tombait sous la qualification de prêt illicite de main-d’œuvre, et en dépit de recherche approfondies avec de grands cabinets juridiques, la parade n’a pu être trouvée.
Il existe une nombreuse jurisprudence sur ce thème.

La charte graphique, ainsi que la dénomination de la Sarl Swaps ont été construitee autour de cette idée.

Cette illégalité a donc limité l’activité de la société Swaps à une activité de contractant général, avec l’utilisation d’entreprises du bâtiment moralement affiliées.

Les opérations traitées étaient très diversifiées :
-	Marchés privés et publics
-	Résidentiel, bureaux et collectivités,
-	Clients privés, publics et professionnels type marchands/rénovateurs.

Au fil du temps l’entreprise Swaps a contracté avec une société détenue par l’associé principal, la Sas Catalpa (créée en 2010) qui exerce l’activité de promoteur/rénovateur pour des opérations de 500 à 1500 m2.

Name: ACF DASE
Description:
ACFDASE, Asesoría y Consultoría Financiera, es un despacho cuyo objetivo principal es aumentar las ventas y el EBITDA de las empresas. 
El despacho fue fundado por el Mtto. y CP. Sergio Amador Zamora. 
ACFDASE, nace en el año 2017. Se tiene y se han asesorado a clientes importantes en la región de Chiapas, México y Puebla, algunos de ellos del giro de comercializan carne, comercialización de camiones,  comercialización de productos de iluminación, cría y engorda de aves,  fabricación de toallas, fabricación de plantas de concreto, comercializadora de refacciones y productos del sector automotriz, producción de agua de garrafón y embotellada, fletes, etc.
Con todas las empresas se han logrado los objetivos trazados, con gran satisfacción de los clientes. 
Los empresarios son los visionarios y motores de sus empresas, como consultores analizamos y damos soluciones o mejoras.
Nuestro objetivo es ir más allá de dar soluciones, es salvaguardar los bienes y servicios (activos) de las empresas mediante controles y análisis, para incrementar las ventas y utilidades.  
ACFDASE ha logrado con su experiencia, liderazgo, dedicación y capacidad, que los clientes queden satisfechos con la asesoría financiera. Por mencionar algunos logros:
•	Aumento en Ventas en tres meses.
•	Crecimiento en EBITDA en tres meses.
•	Disminución de costos y gastos en tres meses.
•	Mejorar indicadores financieros como liquidez, solvencia, EBITDA, apalancamiento, ROI, VPN, rotación de activos, incrementar el valor por acción, etc; 
•	Obtener créditos empresariales, tasas competitivas; 
•	Potencialización del personal “clave”,
•	Integración de equipos de trabajo, 
•	Apertura de nuevas sucursales de negocios exitosas; 
•	Valuar empresas, precio mayor al estimado por los accionistas.
•	Implementación y admon; de flujos de efectivo. 
•	Detección de riesgos fiscales y operativos. 
•	Elaboración de presupuestos y proyecciones;
•	Dar coaching, potencializando al personal.
•	Creación de puestos nuevos

Description:
Fidelia Partners is a relationship-based firm providing independent advice to a select group of Family Offices, as well as sourcing differentiated alternative investments. The team come from leading family offices, private equity funds, investment banks, asset management and accountancy firms, which provides a real breadth of experience to service its clients. 

Fidelia currently has relationships with ~300 Family Offices and selected institutional investors, and is focused on three core pillars: 

1) Family Office Advisory: Supporting Single Family Offices with research, planning & strategy, investment origination & diligence and general advisory

2) Alternative Investment sourcing and placement: We provide access to specialist fund managers (geographic, sector or strategy experts) which provide exposure to enduring secular trends important to us and our network

3) Direct Deals & Co-Investments: Primarily Family Office led direct investments and co-investments alongside experienced entrepreneurs and managers who have a preference for long-term, value-add capital partners

Fidelia is management owned and controlled, allowing us to act and think independently and tailor our approach to our clients’ needs.

Name: Sol Conseil, Patrimoine & Viager
Description:
Cabinet de Conseil, Patrimoine et Viager à Pornic

Cabinet Indépendant doté de fortes compétences en gestion de Patrimoine Nous accompagnons nos clients dans leur projet viager pour mieux vieillir chez soi.
 
Parce que la vente en viager peut-être votre solution mais pas que… votre cabinet vous présente toutes les solutions Viagères (vente ou financière).
 
Notre cabinet résolument tourné vers nos séniors, présente des solutions qui permettent de rendre liquide le patrimoine immobilier détenu et ainsi augmenter son pouvoir d’achat tout en restant chez soi.
Les différentes solutions sont :
 
- La vente en viager Occupé : vente d’un bien immobilier tout en conservant le Droit d’Usage et d’Habitation valorisé dans le prix de vente – lors de la signature chez le notaire notre vendeur devient un crédirentier, percevra une somme d’argent immédiatement puis une rente sa vie durant. Cela permet pour certains dans un premier temps pour certains de faire des voyages, d’améliorer leur habitat, de vivre plus confortablement quotidiennement puis plus tard de pouvoir mettre aisément les services à domicile nécessaires au mieux vieillir chez soi.

- La vente en viager Libre : vente d’un bien immobilier dont on ne conserve pas la jouissance, les modalités de paiement du prix sont les mêmes : une somme d’argent versée immédiatement (le bouquet) puis une rente versée mensuellement de façon viagère. Ce type de vente est souvent mis en place sur la vente d’une résidence locative.
- Le Prêt Viager Hypothécaire : moins connu et moins usité, les propriétaires séniors réalisent un prêt totalement corrélé à leur âge et la valeur du bien dont ils sont propriétaires.. C’est un prêt alloué selon de nombreux critères il est important de nous rencontrer afin  de vous expliquer les acteurs de ce type de projet et leurs conditions.

Nous sommes à votre écoute pour un 1er rendez-vous sans engagement.

Name: Carl
Description:
Notre mission : moderniser la façon d’acquérir, financer, structurer et valoriser l’automobile haut de gamme grâce à une approche fintech, juridique et technologique unique.

CARL repose sur un principe simple :
 Une SPV par véhicule, standardisée, sécurisée et conforme PSFP.
 Une infrastructure qui connecte propriétaires, investisseurs, professionnels et groupes privés.
 Une interface moderne soutenue par l’IA (valorisation 2–5 ans) et un registre blockchain privé (certificats, traçabilité).

Nous couvrons désormais quatre modèles complémentaires, pour répondre aux différents horizons d’investissement :

⸻

 Investissement long terme (patrimonial)

Investir dans des véhicules rares et capter leur valorisation sur plusieurs années, dans un cadre structuré, sécurisé et fiscalement propre.
Pour les propriétaires, votre supercar devient un actif à part entière sans perdre votre passion.

⸻

 Investissement moyen terme (professionnels auto)

Financer le stock premium des professionnels sans immobiliser leur trésorerie.
Les investisseurs perçoivent une part de la marge réalisée à la revente, avec un modèle clair, cadré et transparent.

⸻

 Investissement court terme (achat–revente collectif)

Acheter un véhicule à plusieurs, le revendre rapidement et partager la marge en toute légalité.
Un modèle dynamique, accessible, simple et sécurisé, basé sur des cycles de 1 à 6 mois.

⸻

 Co-acquisition entre amis / groupes privés

Accéder ensemble à un véhicule d’exception dans un cadre légal structuré : assurance SPV, gouvernance claire, usage encadré et neutralité CARL pour éviter les conflits.

⸻

CARL intègre aussi :
• Une IA de valorisation (CARL Value Trend Booster)
• Une blockchain privée non-crypto (registre, certificats, historique)
• Un back-office automatisé pour les SPV
• Des services patrimoniaux premium (reporting, conformité, fiscalité)

Name: Finward - Consulenza Finanziaria Indipendente
Description:
Siamo pionieri nell'ambito della Consulenza Finanziaria Indipendente in Italia, con la nostra fondazione risalente al 2004. La nostra expertise si concentra nell'ideazione di strategie di investimento performanti e nell'offrire una prospettiva completa sulle risorse patrimoniali dei nostri clienti

SUPPORTO DIVERSIFICATO: collaboriamo con investitori e famiglie imprenditoriali al fine di ottimizzare il valore del loro patrimonio e preservarlo dalle sfide che i mercati finanziari possono presentare. Ci impegniamo a semplificare il processo di scelta di investimenti, mettendo sempre al centro gli interessi dei nostri clienti

OBIETTIVI CHIARI: i nostri obiettivi sono ben definiti: miriamo alla crescita e alla difesa del patrimonio dei nostri clienti. Per raggiungere questi obiettivi, sviluppiamo strategie di investimento personalizzate, selezioniamo con attenzione gli strumenti finanziari più efficienti e monitoriamo costantemente i costi finanziari e di gestione bancari

PROTEZIONE: agiamo come filtro tra il cliente e le istituzioni finanziarie, eliminando qualsiasi asimmetria informativa e conflitto di interesse. Questo ci permette di garantire che gli obiettivi di rendimento dei clienti siano prioritari, e vengano perseguiti senza alcun compromesso

METODO EFFICIENTE: il nostro metodo si basa sull'efficienza ad ogni livello operativo. Ci siamo prefissi l'obiettivo di creare un'organizzazione snella e sostenibile in termini di costi di gestione, al fine di offrire servizi di altissima qualità e professionalità che si traducano in vantaggi tangibili per i nostri clienti, sia in termini di risultati ottenuti che di costo dei servizi 

VISIONE TOTALE DEL PATRIMONIO: essenziale per valutare in modo efficace l'allocazione degli investimenti e per la pianificazione delle finanze personali o aziendali

ACCESSO: offriamo la flessibilità di incontri fisici nelle città di Verona, Vicenza, Brescia e Milano, oppure la comodità delle videochiamate per gli incontri digitali

Nos clients sont des citoyens Français, qui vivent et travaillent sur le pays, mais également des Français expatriés (présentement ou par le passé), des étrangers résidents fiscaux ou non, des sportifs et athlètes de haut niveaux. 
Ces derniers sont dans des situations parfois complexes ou floues dans le cadre des démarches suivantes :
- l’optimisation de leurs placements et investissements
- la protection de leur patrimoine des aléas de la vie
- la limitation légale de leur imposition (ingénierie fiscale)
- …et la facilitation de leur succession 

Nous venons alors mettre leur patrimoine à leur service !

----

When creating ALTER PATRIMOINE, we made it our mission to make wealth management advice available and accessible to as many people as possible. 
Our clients include French citizens, who live and work in the country, but also current and former French expatriates, foreigners who may or may not be tax residents, and high-level sportspeople and athletes. 
These types of people sometimes find themselves in complex or unclear situations regarding the following:

- optimizing investments
- protecting assets from life’s uncertainties
- tax engineering
- facilitating the succession of assets

Making their assets work for them is what we do !

Name: QUZARE CAMIONES
Description:
QUZARE Camiones es una comercializadora mexicana de tractocamiones seminuevos que está evolucionando con fuerza y visión hacia convertirse en una agencia con procesos profesionales, atención personalizada y compromiso total con el cliente.

Nuestro enfoque va más allá de la venta. Cada camión que ofrecemos pasa por una revisión mecánica exhaustiva, verificación documental completa y está listo para trabajar desde el primer día. En QUZARE, no entregamos solo fierros: entregamos confianza, respaldo y soluciones reales para transportistas, flotilleros y empresarios del sector.

Estamos orgullosos de ser fundadores del proyecto Vendedor Exclusivo Trucks, una iniciativa que nace para profesionalizar la venta de unidades seminuevas en México, con una visión centrada en el cliente, la transparencia y la experiencia especializada.

En QUZARE construimos relaciones de largo plazo. Ofrecemos opciones de financiamiento, asesoría dedicada y acompañamiento postventa. Conocemos el valor de cada camión y entendemos lo que representa para cada negocio.

Detrás de QUZARE hay un equipo comprometido, apasionado por el transporte, que pisa fuerte y que todos los días se renueva, innova y evoluciona. Nuestro crecimiento es reflejo del trabajo en equipo y de la confianza de nuestros clientes, que nos han elegido por nuestra seriedad, cumplimiento y trato directo.

Hoy, QUZARE Camiones es sinónimo de evolución, profesionalismo y visión. Y esto… apenas comienza.

Name: EMH Capital Partners
Description:
About Us:

EMH Capital Partners offers exclusive opportunities for attracting investments into your business. 
We specialize in organizing premium business lunches in London, Marbella, Monaco, and Dubai, aimed at creating connections between high-growth potential companies and investors. 

Our investor network includes international family offices, private investment trusts, venture capital funds, and high-net-worth individuals.

Why EMH Capital Partners:

We understand the challenges faced by companies and business owners in seeking financing. 
We offer comprehensive solutions—from preparation and planning to the direct organization of the event and follow-ups with investors.

 Our Approach:

Our team, together with analysts, conducts an in-depth analysis of each project to understand its potential and present worthy opportunities to investors. 

Our format allows companies to personally present their project to 15-20 selected profile investors in a comfortable and informal setting of top-tier restaurants and receive feedback.

Our Results:

Last year, we have held over 12 investment dinners for our clients.

During the operation of our consortium in the last 8 years, we have assisted more than 50 companies in raising capital amounting to over 250 million US dollars.

Cooperation with Us:

We aim to build long-term relationships with our clients based on transparency, mutually beneficial partnership, and joint efforts towards achieving common goals. 

If you are in search of financial opportunities, contact us, and we will discuss how our collaboration can contribute to the further development of your business.

We are also interested in establishing partnership relations with investors looking for promising investment opportunities in fast-growing sectors. 

If you are interested in finding new promising projects for investment, we would be pleased to explore collaboration opportunities.

By leveraging cutting-edge risk modeling, we empower investors to optimize performance while maintaining stability in dynamic markets.

The modern investment landscape is complex, data-heavy, and filled with biases that cloud decision-making. Souppe cuts through the noise with an intuitive user interface and personalized investment suggestions, providing clear insights, actionable guidance, and full control over portfolio decisions.

Why Souppe?
 A true investment compass- guiding investors toward robust portfolios while keeping them in control.

 Intuitive and data-driven- simplifying complexity to deliver clear insights and reduce information overload.
 Empowering investors- providing full autonomy while supporting their investment strategies.

With Souppe as your investment compass, you can navigate financial markets with confidence, build robust portfolios, and achieve better long-term results.

Name: MP AMBITION
Description:
Bienvenue chez MP AMBITION, votre partenaire en stratégie patrimoniale.

MP Ambition vous guide à travers les méandres de la fiscalité, des processus financiers, des contraintes légales pour assurer la croissance et la pérennité de votre patrimoine.

Nous sommes animés par la mise à disposition de notre expérience et de notre professionnalisme au service de l’humain. Construisons ensemble cette relation de confiance pour convertir vos ambitions en objectifs atteignables et mesurables dans le temps grâce à un accompagnement régulier. 

Notre méthode consiste en une approche personnalisée avec tout d’abord un temps d’écoute pour comprendre parfaitement votre situation actuelle et vos objectifs. 
Nous vous présentons ensuite la stratégie spécialement élaborée pour vous. Elle reprend vos positions actuelles pour en faire des projections optimisées, à l’appui des règlementations en vigueur.
Nous vous accompagnons enfin dans la mise en œuvre des solutions personnalisées et assurons le suivi des évolutions au fil des années.
Vous l’aurez compris : notre engagement est permanent et ne s’arrête pas à la réalisation d’une simple mission. 

Nous sommes au service des particuliers, chefs d’entreprises et expatriés sur les thématiques suivantes :
•	Création de capital
•	Optimisation de l’épargne
•	Placements immobiliers
•	Maîtrise de la fiscalité
•	Protection de la famille et du chef d’entreprise
•	Préparation de la retraite
•	Succession
•	Assurances et prévoyance

Nous accordons une attention particulière aux procédures que nous déployons afin qu’elles s’inscrivent dans le respect de la règlementation MIF 2 (information et protection des investisseurs).
  
Nous offrons des réponses aux clients sensibles aux investissements socialement responsables (ISR) et/ou aux placements ayant des caractéristiques environnementales et durables. 

Nous travaillons en toute indépendance avec des partenaires fiables sélectionnés selon des critères financiers et extra-financiers (critères ESG) .

Name: BIOAN sp. z o.o.
Description:
Świadczymy profesjonalne usługi doradztwa w zakresie wykorzystania biogazu 
w produkcji energii elektrycznej, produkcji biometanu, bioLNG, bioCO2.
Prowadzimy doradztwo w zakresie projektowania i budowy lokalnych sieci gazowych. Przygotowujemy koncepcje i analizy dla lokalnego wykorzystania biogazu.
Tworzymy analizy opłacalności dla inwestycji biogazowych.
Projektujemy i dostarczamy trasy kablowe, wiązki kablowe, szafy sterownicze i stacje transformatorowe. Oferujemy możliwość dostawy urządzeń elektrycznych „pod klucz”.
Projektujemy i budujemy przyłącza elektroenergetyczne i gazowe.
Dodatkowo rozwijamy technologie dla rynku biogazu w Polsce poprzez realizację projektów R&D.

Name: BERGEN GLOBAL
Description:
Transformamos a forma de viver e morar de pessoas que se encontram no momento de investir em um novo imóvel em São Paulo, para mais qualidade de vida, lazer, inovação, mobilidade, tecnologia, e muito bem estar com segurança.

Para investimentos importantes de alto valor e impacto em suas vidas, ajudamos a identificar e entender bem suas necessidades, desejos e expectativas na faixa de preços mais adequada.

Pesquisamos opções dentro do perfil definido, facilitando o acesso a informações dos projetos e obras disponíveis, preços, ofertas e promoções correntes.

Passo-a-passo superamos as várias dificuldades, para encontrar a melhor opção sem precisar visitar dezenas das construtoras, plantões de venda, sites, propaganda midiática, corretores e infinitas informações. 
Economizamos tempo do cliente, trocando informações para ir diretamente ao principal, que realmente importa ao cliente comprador de um imóvel.

A estrutura de atendimento no Brasil, Estados Unidos (Miami, Orlando), e Europa (Portugal, França, Inglaterra, Espanha), é baseada em bons relacionamentos:

RELAÇÃO COM CONSTRUTORAS E INCORPORADORAS: recebemos informações dos projetos novos, obras em andamento, plantas, preços, promoções e condições especiais, atualizadas em nossos bancos de dados para monitoramento e comparação.
Também promovemos eventos de divulgação das novidades a grupos de pessoas convidados.

RELAÇÃO COM PARCEIROS: temos rede de parceiros credenciados, licenciados em cada cidade com demanda. 
Eles conhecem bem suas regiões, e em outros países selecionamos parceiros que falam português, para atender localmente nossos clientes, de forma personalizada e agendada com antecedência.

From commercial and industrial rooftop installations (C&I) to utility-scale solar assets, our team delivers full-spectrum support, covering strategic planning, equipment procurement, technical and legal due diligence, EPC coordination, and investment structuring.

Name: Bik Invest
Description:
En Bik Invest, entendemos que el mundo de las inversiones inmobiliarias puede ser complejo y a menudo intimidante. Por eso, nos dedicamos a ofrecerte una asesoría personalizada que te permitirá navegar con confianza por el mercado inmobiliario, tanto en Chile como en Estados Unidos.

Nuestros expertos, con años de experiencia en el sector, están aquí para guiarte paso a paso en la selección de propiedades que no solo cumplan con tus expectativas, sino que también ofrezcan un potencial de valorización atractivo. Nos enfocamos en identificar oportunidades únicas que se alineen perfectamente con tus objetivos de inversión, ya sean residenciales, comerciales o industriales.

Pero eso no es todo, sabemos que el financiamiento es clave en cualquier inversión. En Bik Invest, además de asesorarte, gestionamos créditos hipotecarios ajustados a tus necesidades. Trabajamos codo a codo contigo para encontrar las mejores condiciones y tasas del mercado, facilitando así el camino hacia la adquisición de tu próxima inversión inmobiliaria.

Imagina tener un aliado estratégico que entiende tus metas y trabaja incansablemente para ayudarte a alcanzarlas. Ese es nuestro compromiso en Bik Invest. No importa si estás dando tus primeros pasos en el mundo de las inversiones o si ya eres un inversor experimentado buscando expandir tu portafolio, estamos aquí para apoyarte.

Name: KERN PATRIMOINE
Description:
Le cabinet Kern Patrimoine est né de la reprise en 2023 du cabinet CLB Patrimoine qui accompagne depuis près de 20 ans une clientèle de particuliers, de dirigeants d’entreprises, de professions libérales et d’entreprises de l’Ouest de la France. 

En 2025, Kern Patrimoine se renforce dans le Morbihan avec la reprise du cabinet Ageci Finances, présent depuis 1991 dans la région de Lorient.


Notre cabinet a une approche globale afin de sélectionner pour le compte de ses clients des solutions d’investissements variées afin de répondre au mieux à leurs profils et à leurs objectifs.

Name: Dalion Partners Investissements
Description:
À propos de Dalion Partners

Dalion Partners Investissements & International est un cabinet indépendant qui accompagne dirigeants, investisseurs et expatriés dans la structuration de leur patrimoine et leur implantation en France.

Dalion Investissements propose un conseil patrimonial global : stratégies d’investissement sur toutes les classes d’actifs, optimisation fiscale, transmission, et expertise pointue en acquisition de biens immobiliers en nue-propriété.

Dalion International facilite l’installation des expatriés et investisseurs étrangers en France : gestion de projet, accompagnement administratif, fiscal et culturel, pour une intégration réussie.

Notre approche sur mesure, combinant expertise financière et accompagnement opérationnel, garantit des solutions adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client.

⸻

 About Dalion Partners

Dalion Partners Investissements & International is an independent firm assisting business leaders, investors, and expatriates in wealth structuring and relocation to France.

Dalion Investissements offers comprehensive wealth advisory services: investment strategies across all asset classes, tax optimization, estate planning, and specialized expertise in acquiring real estate through usufruct arrangements.

Dalion International supports expatriates and foreign investors in settling in France: project management, administrative, tax, and cultural assistance for successful integration.

Our tailored approach, combining financial expertise and operational support, ensures solutions aligned with each client’s unique needs.

Name: Venta de carteras NPL
Description:
La cesión de créditos consiste en la compra a bancos y fondos de inversión de los créditos que se deben sobre un inmueble. Es decir, la primera hipoteca que un deudor debe sobre una vivienda y ha dejado de pagar. (Siempre compramos primera carga registral, nunca segundas o terceras hipotecas). 

Los bancos y fondos de inversión nos envían listados (que pasamos por los grupos de inversores), que constituyen sus carteras de hipotecas que el deudor hipotecario ha dejado de pagar. En esos listados, aparecen datos identificativos de las propiedades (dirección, ciudad, referencia catastral en algunos listados, etc.). Una vez manifestamos al banco el interés en una propiedad, solicitamos la documentación judicial relativa al proceso hipotecario.  

Cuando se compra una hipoteca, hay que estudiar la situación jurídica del inmueble a efectos de verificar si la operación es buena o no, de cara a obtener la máxima rentabilidad. Para ello solicitamos al fondo/banco: estado de la deuda, si está judicializado, acta de fijación de saldo, notas simples, si hay avalistas del crédito hipotecario, informe de tasación hipotecaria (se ha puesto ya la demanda de ejecución hipotecaria, o bien la ejecución de títulos judiciales), en qué fase del proceso está, auto de despacho de ejecución, auto de cláusulas abusivas si lo hay, si está pendiente ya de salir a subasta o si se trata de una cesión de remate, además del estado posesorio (si hay inquilinos, si vive el deudor, si hay ocupas, etc.).
 
Una operación de compra de crédito es buena si: compramos por debajo del valor de la deuda, y por tanto lo que se debe es superior a lo que pagamos, y si el valor de venta real en mercado es superior a lo que hemos pagado. Una operación no es buena cuando se debe muy poco de hipoteca, porque en este caso el banco suele pedir que paguemos casi el total de la hipoteca y, por tanto, si alguien puja en subasta, no vamos a sacar mucha diferencia.

Nossa metodologia inovadora centraliza na Escada Flexível, uma abordagem que integra consórcios inteligentes, consultoria financeira personalizada e intermediação imobiliária estratégica.

Entre os nossos principais produtos e serviços estão:

Consórcios Estratégicos: Planejamos soluções personalizadas que utilizam consórcios como uma alternativa eficaz para aquisição de bens e alavancagem patrimonial, sem os altos juros de financiamentos tradicionais.
Consultoria Financeira Personalizada: Apoiamos clientes a traçar um planejamento financeiro que acompanha suas metas de curto, médio e longo prazo.
Intermediação Imobiliária com Análises Avançadas: Identificamos as melhores oportunidades do mercado para compra, venda e investimento, sempre com foco na maximização dos resultados.
Educação Financeira: Oferecemos conteúdos educativos, palestras e workshops para capacitar nossos clientes a tomarem decisões mais inteligentes e seguras.
Com transparência, inovação constante e um compromisso inabalável com o sucesso de nossos clientes, somos parceiros daqueles que buscam planejamento, crescimento e realização financeira. Conecte-se conosco e descubra como podemos ajudá-lo a transformar sonhos em conquistas reais.

The company specializes in services and investments in the UTP (Unlikely to Pay) segment related to retail real estate credit.

Through close collaboration with credit institutions and investment funds, ITAPROPERTY aims to unlock stalled mortgage credits, providing a concrete and alternative solution to judicial litigation. This approach helps prevent the deterioration of UTPs into distressed credits, while simultaneously protecting the value of bank portfolios.

ITAPROPERTY's strategy also translates into concrete support for debtors, offering them opportunities to avoid the foreclosure of real estate assets and promoting sustainable and beneficial management for all parties involved.

ITAPROPERTY's mission is to create value by leveraging opportunities offered by low-risk investments with high potential, in crisis contexts or those requiring new impulses to relaunch.

We are a dynamic and competent team that over time has ensured

Patrimonial Vision è un team di Specialisti in Integrazione Patrimoniale che opera esclusivamente con Imprenditori e famiglie imprenditoriali. 

Patrimonial Vision nasce dalla necessità di trovare una soluzione innovativa ed efficace basata su un Sistema integrato di analisi e monitoraggio del patrimonio (componenti finanziarie, immobiliari e aziendali) che consente di definire un percorso condiviso con l’imprenditore e finalizzato all’ottenimento dei risultati che  desidera.

Patrimonial Vision si spinge dove nessuno è mai arrivato nel mondo della consulenza patrimoniale, dimostrando e producendo risultati tangibili prima di chiedere qualcosa in cambio agli imprenditori con cui collabora.

Un Sistema in grado di definire la strategia per raggiungere gli obiettivi patrimoniali prefissati e anche con quali strumenti e interlocutori e opportuno farlo.

Patrimonial Vision è un team di Professionisti indipendenti, libero da qualsiasi vincolo con enti di natura bancaria o finanziaria, che non deve promuovere alcun tipo di “prodotto” e che può quindi porsi al completo servizio dell’imprenditore, costruendo un rapporto fiduciario che non ha eguali sul mercato e da cui, comunque, l’imprenditore può svincolarsi in qualsiasi momento, senza alcun problema.

Il team opera quindi al fianco dell’imprenditore per consentirgli di valutare se tutti gli strumenti e gli interlocutori oggi interessati dalla sua gestione patrimoniale operano in modo efficace ed efficiente e quali sono aree in cui è possibile ottimizzare rapporti e risorse.

Per l’imprenditore è come avere un “super esperto” al suo fianco che può consentirgli di raggiungere i suoi obiettivi patrimoniali, confermando o sostituendo rapporti, asset o relazioni che non siano utili o non in linea con il con il conseguimento dei risultati desiderati, sia in ambito finanziario, che immobiliare che aziendale.

Patromial Vision è il Sistema che ti libera dal "sistema".

Name: 口袋證券投資顧問股份有限公司
Description:
【關於CMoney Fund 口袋】

CMoney Fund (口袋投顧) ，是CMoney 全曜財經旗下之資產管理公司， CMoney獨步全球採先進雲端技術的高速回測系統，支援國內外400多家法人投資機構，為市佔率超過90%的法人機構領導品牌。

2010年起，CMoney 開發各類協助散戶的App，滿足用戶在投資上的工具使用與社群內容需求，2011年更推出理財寶並於2021年理財寶會員突破730萬人，其中股市爆料同學會、武財神、ICHECK、發票載具、ETF存股、簡單記帳都是深受消費者喜愛的App。

CMoney Fund，專注於全權委託、企業員工退休規劃、投資顧問業務的投資顧問機構之一，擁有合法的證券投資顧問執照，並受金管會全程監理。

我們感受產業更迭與金融科技進化，將延伸我們的科技專業，計畫於近期成立對話式的基金平台，堅守「以專業守護信任、以長期成就價值」的理念，打造真正的Fintech 環境，為企業、高資產及個別投資人提供專業、穩健的資產配置與服務。

CMoney Fund 不只具備財經大數據的背景，更是一群相信數據、堅信誠信、用心成就他人的夥伴所組成的團隊。我們相信，「投資是一場長跑，贏在紀律與智慧」，唯有與客戶建立長期的信任夥伴關係，才能真正實現財富管理的核心價值。

【CMoney Fund的經營精神】

在這個資訊爆炸、市場變化瞬息萬變的時代，投資不能僅靠經驗與直覺。我們引以為傲的，是團隊自主開發的大數據量化決策模型，結合統計學、數學、行為金融學與AI演算法，建構出科學化、紀律化的投資流程，從選股、風控到部位調整，每一步都經過嚴謹驗證與實戰演練。

我們不只投資「市場」，我們更投資「人」。CMoney 擁有一個開放、協作的組織文化，團隊架構扁平、資訊流通透明。我們相信每位成員的潛力，提供從新手到資深的全階段職涯發展支持，包括：

- 系統化的職能養成訓練
- 實戰演練與導師制陪跑
- 持續精進的跨部門學習平台
- 鼓勵創新與自我實現的環境

我們看重財富管理的品格操守與專業素養，鼓勵持續學習精進的動能，讓優秀人才不斷茁壯。

【CMoney Fund的市場定位】

30多年來，我們所堅持的，不是追求市場聲量、短線熱度，而是穩紮穩打地累積信任與績效。我們的投資團隊深受客戶肯定，服務過的法人、企業主與高淨值個人，絕大多數都是長期合作夥伴，並經由口碑自然傳遞。

我們不只是幫客戶投資資產，更是陪伴他們看懂風險、掌握週期、實現人生夢想。我們的經營成績不僅希望「一時亮眼」，更追求「經得起時間考驗」。

現在，我們誠摯邀請你加入CMoney Fund，如果你對金融充滿熱情、擁有敏銳觀察力、重視誠信，並渴望在變動中追求穩定價值，那麼，我們會是你實現理想的起點。

Sociis Invest BV is een strategische investerings- en holdingmaatschappij die ondernemers ondersteunt bij het bouwen van krachtige, duurzame bedrijven – met een focus op technische en operationele sectoren.

Wij zijn onder andere de holding achter TORTUS, een snelgroeiende organisatie actief in arbeidsbemiddeling binnen de techniek. Vanuit deze structuur helpen wij bedrijven hun volledige potentieel te benutten — niet alleen met kapitaal, maar vooral met kennis, structuur en netwerk.

Wij bieden:
• Strategisch advies & groeibegeleiding
• Ondersteuning op het gebied van HR, marketing, legal, finance en IT
• Volledige backoffice & compliance
• Toegang tot een krachtig netwerk van professionals en opdrachtgevers

Onze deelnemingen opereren zelfstandig, maar maken gebruik van de collectieve kracht van Sociis Invest. Zo ontstaan er sterke merken, schaalbare modellen en ruimte voor ondernemers om te doen waar ze goed in zijn.

We bouwen actief aan een ecosysteem van bedrijven en partner-BV’s.
Ondernemers met visie en ambitie vinden bij Sociis Invest een solide fundament om versneld en gecontroleerd te groeien.

Основными ценностями, которыми руководствуется Таджикско-Узбекской Инвестиционной Компании (ТУИК) в своей деятельности, является обеспечение высокого качества предоставляемых услуг, сочетаемого с применением наиболее гибкого и эффективного индивидуального подхода к каждому клиенту.
Одним из основных целей Таджикско-Узбекской Инвестиционной Компании является социально-экономической развитие республики. Другим приоритетным направлением в деятельности компании является поддержка малого и среднего бизнеса путем вхождения в прямое партнерство с инвестором проекта (прямое инвестирование), а также услуги по разработке и финансированию лизинговых сделок в различных направлениях и сферах экономики. Description:

Nous créons des stratégies d’investissement personnalisées, audacieuses et rentables, adaptées aux objectifs précis de chacun de nos clients. Notre différence ? Une maîtrise parfaite de l’ensemble des dimensions patrimoniales : immobilières, financières, fiscales et sociétaires.

Notre approche est claire : nous ne laissons rien au hasard. Grâce à un réseau d’experts internes et à une synergie puissante avec nos filiales spécialisées, Hauts-Toits (immobilier off-market et chasse patrimoniale), Abby (rénovation et valorisation d’actifs), GèreBnb (gestion locative optimisée) et Weemany (growth et structuration d’entreprises), chaque projet est traité avec précision, rapidité et efficacité.

Nous ne suivons pas les tendances, nous les créons. C’est pourquoi nous avons lancé SIGNATURE, notre offre exclusive et annuelle : une collection limitée de 20 immeubles clés en main, sélectionnés pour leur potentiel exceptionnel, transformés par nos équipes de rénovation, optimisés fiscalement et structurés juridiquement pour une rentabilité optimale et durable.

Notre promesse : transformer votre patrimoine en véritable actif stratégique. Qu’il s’agisse d’investissements immobiliers haut-de-gamme, de structuration patrimoniale complexe, ou encore de projets financiers pointus, notre équipe d’experts vous garantit des résultats concrets et mesurables.

Notre siège à Arras est le cœur stratégique où imagination et rigueur se rencontrent.

------------------------------------------
Comment conjuguer prise en compte des enjeux environnementaux, sociaux et de gouvernance, flécher les capitaux vers des solutions véritablement efficaces pour la planète et nos territoires tout en délivrant une rentabilité de l’investissement suffisante à long terme ?

Dans un environnement économique particulièrement complexe, les entreprises et les investisseurs doivent repenser leurs approches pour répondre aux défis environnementaux, sociétaux et de gouvernance, et répondre à la quête de sens des épargnants.

Cinq sociétés de gestion, deux agences de notation extra-financière et un spécialiste de l’analyse de données, tous référents dans leur spécialité, partageront avec vous leurs expertises, leurs convictions ainsi que des solutions et illustrations concrètes pour vous permettre de prendre les bonnes décisions et d’accompagner vos clients et partenaires dans leurs choix d’investissements.

Cet événement est dédié aux professionnels de la finance : institutionnels, sélectionneurs de fonds, multigérants, banquiers privés et CGP, family offices, assureurs, plateformes de distribution…

Name: Catena Capital
Description:
Catena Capital specialises in working with clients who have a genuine desire to raise capital, build their business, and aim for an exit within 3-5 years. Their ideal client profile spans from Seed to IPO stages and emphasizes strong, visionary founders with relevant industry experience, a clear passion for their product or service, and the ability to articulate their vision compellingly. 
Catena values clients who are coachable, open to feedback, and demonstrate active listening. They seek companies with realistic valuations, expectations, and budgets for capital raises, as well as strong governance and compliance procedures. 
For Seed rounds, Catena looks for companies with a proven MVP, early market traction, and initial revenue generation, typically seeking $500K to $2M in funding. As companies progress to Series A, they should demonstrate significant revenue (approaching or exceeding $1 million annually), strong growth potential, and seek $2-10 million in funding. For Series B or IPO stages, ideal clients show substantial market traction, significant revenue generation ($5m+ annually), and a clear path to profitability.
Throughout all stages, Catena prioritises clients with a strong market position, a well-developed business model, and a clear strategy for scaling and expansion will have the best chance of success.

Name: Eugenio Tomasa Educador Financiero
Description:
Me considero una persona como cualquier otra, en mi opinión la vida a veces nos hace vivir experiencias que marcan nuestra evolución y desarrollo como personas y, sólo años más tarde nos damos cuenta de ello.

Salí de casa con 16 años para formarme en dirección hotelera, tuve que desplazarme a otras ciudades, aprender a vivir solo, ganar dinero y adminístralo adecuadamente porque en casa los recursos no sobraban, eran otros tiempos y había lo que había. Cuando terminé tenía 21 años.

Durante este tiempo tuve que pagar estudios, patrona, comer, vestir y si quedaba algo destinarlo
al ocio, este era el orden. Trabajaba tres meses en verano y con este dinero y el de los fines de semana de los nueve meses de estudio podía hacer frente a los gastos.

Sin darme cuenta estaba incorporando una serie de hábitos que todavía hoy conservo, evaluar gastos, conseguir los recursos para hacerles frente, destinar los recursos según la prioridad y planificar en el tiempo cómo hacerlo.

“La educación financiera básicamente consiste en esto, tener objetivos claros, pensar en lo que se
necesita, planificar cómo se va a hacer y comprometerse en conseguirlo”.

“La educación financiera no hace diferencias entre economías modestas y holgadas, sirve para ambas, porque cada una persigue distintos objetivos”.

Propóngaselo y se sorprenderá.
Quedo a la espera de sus noticias
Un cordial saludo

Name: Celsius Re Ltd.
Description:
Celsius Re is my investment advisory vehicle. My clients have been investment banks, private equity firms, sovereign wealth funds, family offices, and pension funds. My role is to assist these firms with Re/Insurance buy side M&A. What began as ad hoc advisory has morphed into a business. Celsius Re has acted as an advisor to over $2 billion of Re/Insurance transaction value M&A.

Unlike a typical M&A advisory, my firm embeds itself within the firm that has engaged us. We work with our client side by side and typically onsite through the transactions conclusion. We serve as the engaged firms experience re/insurance market professional for hire. 

We serve the engaged firm from preliminary through to confirmatory due diligence. We have brought value by both flushing out  issues by working with our client and sell side in finding solutions to those issues. We have also brought transaction creative value by finding solutions to potential transactional roadblocks.

We have been involved in business model creation, co-investor presentations and third party professional (actuarial, governance, legal) appointment. to the transaction who will bring value added. 

We have seen our role grow by transaction. We are now actively involved in confirmatory due diligence, transaction terms as well as reps and warranties. Our resolve is to be constructive and helpful. Not hinder the closing process.

Celsius Re is not a buy side investors legal, actuarial, audit, governance, asset management or investment banking advisory. Those roles and the legal implications of those roles are best served with firms of scale and reputation.
We instead focuses on assisting the client on the optimal usage of the advisory services that it has deployed.

Look at Celsius Re as the hiring of Re/Insurance investment professionals with nearly four decades of experience. As an in house consultant onsite to provide professional support during your due diligence process. 

pmills@celsiusre.com

Name: MSJ ESTATES
Description:
MSJ Estates is a property development company that specializes in converting period buildings into high-end residential properties. We are committed to providing our investors with a high return on their investment, and we have a proven track record of success.

Our team of experienced professionals has a deep understanding of the local market, and we are always up-to-date on the latest trends in period restoration. We work closely with our investors to create custom investment plans that meet their specific needs.

Our current project is the conversion of a late 19th-century nurses home into 10 residential units in south Cambridge. These units will be of the highest quality, and we are confident that they will be a valuable investment for our investors.
We offer a 12% return to our investors, and we have never missed a deadline or come in over budget. We are also committed to underpromising and over-delivering, and we believe that this is the best way to build trust with our investors.

Our goal is to move from conversions to ground-up developments within the next 12 to 18 months. We believe that this is the next step in our growth, and we are confident that we have the skills and experience to succeed.

If you are interested in learning more about MSJ Estates, please contact us today. We would be happy to answer any of your questions.

Description:
Nossa metodologia é testada e validada, foi desenhada em cima de 4 pilares: Risco, tempo, confiança e dados. A combinação desses pilares se encaixam para suprir as principais dificuldades de quem busca investir em franquias no Brasil hoje, por isso prezamos por: 
●	Redução de risco: analisamos diversos indicadores que precisam atender uma pontuação minima para a marca poder ser indicada pelo nosso grupo como: credibilidade, referência, presença de mercado, analise de suporte e outros pilares fundamentais.
●	Economia de tempo: quem hoje tem tempo para mergulhar em um universo de mais de 3.000 opções de negócios? Através do nosso banco de dados, experiência e estudos aprofundados das marcas, vivemos esse mercado todos os dias, somos obcecados por entregar as melhores soluções aos nossos clientes.
●	Confiabilidade: a confiança que a Franqueadora oferece ao fraqueado precisa ser clara e consistente, principalmente ao se tratar de: financeiro, contabilidade, processos, suporte e treinamento, desenvolvemos técnicas que nos ajudam a previnir e blindar o início da sua jornada antes de realizar o seu investimento.
●	 Análise de Dados: selecionamos os dados primordiais para te guiar nessa jornada. Lembre-se: estamos falando do seu investimento! Por isso é necessário apurar cuidadosamente os dados que darão embasamento para uma tomada de decisão. Essa parte a gente cuida pra você!

Do you think investing in contemporary art is expensive? That’s not always the case. You’ll find a variety of options here, ranging from a few hundred to several hundred thousand dollars per piece. Wij geloven in de kracht van samenwerking en zien onszelf als een familiebedrijf waarin vertrouwen, kwetsbaarheid en open communicatie de basis vormen van succes.

Binnen MSD Groep vormen onze eigen bedrijven het fundament, aangevuld met zorgvuldig gekozen participaties. Daarbij hanteren we het principe van 10x1 in plaats van 1x10: niet de snelle, eenmalige klap, maar duurzaam opbouwen, herinvesteren en samen groeien.

Mens, Innovatie en Techniek staan bij ons centraal. We investeren niet alleen in kapitaal, maar vooral in mensen, kennis en samenwerking. Zo ontstaat een krachtig netwerk waarin bedrijven, partners en participaties elkaar versterken en samen bouwen aan groei die blijvend van waarde is.

Name: Ard Invest
Description:
Ard Invest: Your Beacon in Indonesia's Land Investment Terrain.

The modern investment landscape is rife with challenges: from the daunting maze of options, a reactive market, to a knowledge gap that keeps many at bay. Enter Ard Invest, your trusted partner, adept at turning these pain points into unparalleled opportunities.

We specialize in identifying undervalued assets across the Asia Pacific, primarily in Indonesia's promising farmland and real estate sectors. By leveraging our extensive local expertise, we offer 360-degree support – from land scouting to administrative, legal, and fiscal guidance, all while championing responsible ESG practices.

Our collaboration with local landowners has paved a distinctive path, fostering mutual growth. This, coupled with the captivating allure of Indonesia's 17,000 islands, offers investors not just financial gains, but a chance to sculpt lasting legacies on pristine landscapes.

Lombok, though often overshadowed by Bali, is emerging as a prime choice for discerning investors. Its untouched beauty, combined with real estate prices significantly more attractive than Bali, presents a rare proposition. Amplifying this potential is the Indonesian government’s focus on diversifying tourism, placing Lombok on an upward trajectory.

At Ard Invest, investing transcends mere financial decisions. It's about curating legacies in one of the world's most promising markets. 

Reach out to Ard Invest, and together, let's chart a future laden with opportunity.

Through their expertise and knowledge, KS Mutual Fund Distributors help investors navigate the vast array of mutual fund options available.

These distributors act as intermediaries, simplifying the investment process and providing valuable insights to clients. They assess clients' risk appetite, financial objectives, and investment preferences to recommend suitable mutual fund schemes from various AMCs. By leveraging their expertise and market insights, they guide investors in making informed decisions aligned with their specific goals.

In addition to personalized guidance, KS Mutual Fund Distributors provide assistance with investment transactions, including the purchase, redemption, and switching of mutual fund units. They ensure smooth and efficient execution of these transactions, ensuring clients' investments are managed effectively.

With their extensive knowledge of the mutual fund industry, KS Mutual Fund Distributors help investors make well-informed investment decisions. By offering a diverse range of mutual fund options across different asset classes, they enable clients to build a well-balanced and diversified investment portfolio tailored to their needs.

Overall, the role of a KS Mutual Fund Distributor is to empower investors by providing them with personalized guidance, facilitating investment transactions, and helping them achieve their financial goals through a wide range of mutual fund options.

Name: Akari Capital
Description:
Akari Capital was set up by long time investment and finance professionals who contributed in building sustainable and impact investing globally in the last 2 decades.  

We believe in making good financial returns, while problem solving to green the planet and empower people and importantly grow. Yoshiko Saito and Yoko Sugita founded Akari Capital, with Mari Kogiso as an advisor. Akari Capital is in partnership with SDG Impact Japan and  Paterson Sustainability.

Akari Capital aims to bridge genuine climate and social investments and investors, with large institutional, corporate and public/governments through its impact platform and impact advisory business. 

The **Impact Platform** aggregates impact funds and direct investments that are tailor made to the investors’ strategic impact objectives. Akari Capital will support with referring to global opportunities, perform a detialed impact and financial due diligence, and create a well diversified strategic impact portfolio to be monitored closely for strategic impact and financial returns achievement. This is suited for corporates looking for strategic investment opportunities for new technology and renewable energy acquisition to transition/GX their existing business, as well as institutional investors looking for a well diversified portfolio in genuine impact investing with risk appropriate financial returns.

The **Impact Advisory** business looks to support sustainable and impact investors as well as ESG investors, such as climate and social funds as well as institutional, corporate and public/governments as a general sparring partner or “fractional CSO” service, advancing investors’ climate and social strategy including disclosure and marketing, as well as planning an investment stage apporpriate net zero roadmap and action plan.

We take action to grow, green the planet, and empower people. We aspire to critically scale up impact investing.

Name: Fonds Europe Financial Services GmbH

Wir versprechen unseren Kunden Transparenz und Klarheit in der komplexen Welt der Finanzen, um fundierte Entscheidungen zu ermöglichen. Menschen aus allen Lebenslagen vertrauen auf Fonds Europe, weil wir mehr als nur Investitionen bieten – wir bieten Lösungen.

Wofür wir stehen

Der langfristige Erfolg von Fonds Europe basiert auf unserer Mission, eine bessere finanzielle Zukunft für unsere Kunden zu schaffen. Unsere Kultur und Prinzipien sind die Leitsterne auf diesem Weg – sie erinnern uns stets daran, was wirklich zählt: das finanzielle Wohlergehen aller zu verbessern.

Wir suchen nach Menschen, die unsere Vision teilen und unsere Werte leben – bekannt als die Fonds Europe-Philosophie. Zusammenarbeit ist unser Schlüssel zum Erfolg, und ein inklusives, gerechtes Umfeld ist der Boden, auf dem wir wachsen und gedeihen.

Description:
Deluxe Finance : votre partenaire en gestion de patrimoine

Depuis 5 ans, Laurent Franc dirige Deluxe Finance, une société dédiée à l'accompagnement des particuliers et des professionnels dans l’optimisation et le développement de leur patrimoine. Fort de son expérience et de son engagement personnel, Laurent Franc, titulaire du statut de Conseiller en Investissement Financier (CIF), offre des solutions sur mesure adaptées à vos objectifs et à votre situation.

Nos solutions

→ Développement de votre épargne

- Investissements financiers : portefeuilles d’actions, obligations…
- Investissements immobiliers : acquisitions de biens locatifs, SCPI, et opportunités dans l’immobilier commercial.

→ Optimisation de votre fiscalité 

- Défiscalisation : via des dispositifs comme le Malraux, le déficit foncier, ou le Girardin industriel.
- Conseils en placements : choix de produits d’épargne avec avantages fiscaux, comme l’assurance-vie ou les PEA.

→ Préparation de la retraite pour maintenir votre niveau de vie

- Plans d’épargne retraite (PER) : pour constituer une rente à long terme.
- Stratégies de diversification : répartir vos investissements.

→ Accompagnement en donation et succession

- Stratégies de donation : pour réduire les droits de donation et favoriser la transmission anticipée.
- Planification successorale : pour une transmission de patrimoine optimisée et sereine.

→ Accompagnement des professionnels

- Placements de trésorerie : identification des meilleures options pour rentabiliser les excédents de trésorerie.
- Stratégies d’investissement : pour s’adapter aux fluctuations économiques et maximiser les rendements.

→ Un accompagnement personnalisé

Chez Deluxe Finance, chaque client est unique. Nous analysons vos besoins et vos objectifs pour vous proposer des solutions à court, moyen, et long terme, afin de sécuriser et faire fructifier votre patrimoine tout au long de votre vie.

Name: ACG Inversiones (Auction Capital Group SL)
Description:
ACG Inversiones – (Auction Capital Group SL), es una firma especializada en inversión inmobiliaria en España, enfocada en la identificación, adquisición, gestión y revalorización de activos inmobiliarios con alto potencial de rentabilidad.

Nuestra actividad se centra en segmentos de alta complejidad y elevada barrera de entrada, donde el conocimiento experto, la capacidad analítica y la experiencia operativa marcan la diferencia: activos ocupados, cesiones de remate, subastas judiciales y extrajudiciales, NPLs (Non-Performing Loans), REOs y nudas propiedades.

ACG nace de la experiencia directa en uno de los referentes del mercado de cesiones de remate en España, Auctree. Uno de los socios fundadores de ACG fue director de ventas desde los inicios de dicha plataforma, participando activamente en la estructuración, comercialización y gestión de operaciones vinculadas a:

- Activos inmobiliarios ocupados
- Cesiones de remate (CDRs)
- Subastas inmobiliarias
- Carteras de deuda inmobiliaria (NPLs)
- Activos adjudicados (REOs)
- Inversión en nuda propiedad

Este bagaje proporciona a ACG un conocimiento profundo del ciclo completo de inversión inmobiliaria alternativa, desde el análisis legal y financiero hasta la ejecución, gestión del riesgo y desinversión.

En ACG, trabajamos con un enfoque analítico, disciplinado y orientado a resultados, aplicando criterios de value investing inmobiliario y gestión activa del riesgo.

Identificamos oportunidades de inversión mediante:

- Subastas judiciales y extrajudiciales
- Operaciones off-market
- Activos distressed y situaciones especiales
- Carteras de crédito inmobiliario (NPLs)

Nuestro objetivo es maximizar la rentabilidad para inversores privados e institucionales, optimizando cada fase del proceso: adquisición, gestión, reposicionamiento, revalorización y venta.

ACG, se posiciona como un partner estratégico en inversión inmobiliaria alternativa, combinando experiencia, especialización y ejecución profesional.

Description:

Vores tilgang er at skræddersy en investeringsportefølje der passer til dig og din situation. Sammensætningen af investeringsporteføljen sker med værktøjer fra hele investeringsspektrummets værktøjskasse og ikke kun enkelte aktivtyper som f.eks. aktier. Eksponeringer forankres typisk ikke i enkelte værdipapirer, men spredes i stedet ud på flere forskellige værdipapirer via fonde eller ETF'er.

JPLInvest er uvildig investeringsrådgiver, hvilket vil sige, at vi ikke modtager honorarer fra tredjemand for at vise dig i vedkommendes retning. Vores eneste mål er skabe værdi for dig. Kun hvis vi kan skabe værdi for dig, kan du skabe værdi for os.

Name: Biotech for VCs
Description:
Welcome to "Biotech for VCs" your go-to resource for investors interested in the dynamic world of Agri Food Environmental and Industrial Biotechnology. This page serves as a comprehensive guide to help VCs navigate the intricacies of investing in the biotech sector and make informed decisions that drive both financial success and positive societal impact.

Our goal is to equip VCs with the knowledge and insights necessary to identify promising biotech opportunities, assess their potential, and maximize returns on investment. We understand that investing in biotechnology requires a unique understanding of scientific advancements, regulatory landscapes, market dynamics, and the inherent risks and challenges involved. Biotech for VCs is designed to bridge that knowledge gap and provide VCs with a competitive edge in this rapidly evolving industry.

Note: we do not suggest companies, rather we run due diligences on the ones you submit to us!

What you can expect from us:

1. Industry Insights: Stay updated with the latest trends, breakthroughs, and innovations shaping the biotech landscape. Gain access to expert analysis and market intelligence to identify emerging sectors, disruptive technologies, and high-growth potential areas.

2. Investment Strategies: Discover effective investment strategies tailored specifically for biotech investments. Learn about risk assessment, due diligence processes, valuation techniques, and portfolio management strategies that maximize returns while managing inherent risks.

3. Deal Flow: Explore profiles of promising biotech startups, early-stage ventures, and established companies seeking VC funding. Gain insights into their technology platforms, competitive advantages, and growth potential.

Whether you are a seasoned VC looking to expand your portfolio into biotech or a new entrant seeking to understand the unique dynamics of the industry, Biotech for VCs provides the resources and guidance you need to navigate the biotech investment.

مجموعة تانجبل الكويت، هي شركة ريادية مُتخصصة في تقديم خدمات الاستشارات المالية والإدارية وأنشطة التنمية الاقتصادية.

تمتلك مجموعة تانجبل الكويت خبرة تمتد لسنوات طويلة في قطاع الخدمات والأعمال الاقتصادية و الاستشارية للشركات؛ مثل الدراسات المالية والاقتصادية كدراسات الجدوى، ووضع ميزانية الشركات، وتمويل المشروعات، كذلك تطوير الاستراتيجيات المالية للمؤسسات، وتقييم وضع وأنظمة الشركات وإعادة هيكلتها، مع رصد وتحليل نتائج الخطط المالية، وتقييم المشروعات الاستثمارية، بالإضافة إلى دعم الاستثمار داخل الدول ودراسة المخاطر المالية المُحتملة والتخطيط الجيد لها.


تحظى مجموعة تانجبل الكويت بفريق عمل متميّز يتألف من مجموعة من الاستشاريين من ذوي الخبرة العلمية والمهنية، يعملون وفق تطبيق أفضل النُظُم والمعايير الدُولية في جميع الهيئات والشركات والمؤسسات جنبًا إلى جنب فلسفتنا الاستثمارية المرنة لتحقيق أفضل النتائج المرجوّة من قبل عملائنا.

تانجبل الكويت هى إحدى شركات مجموعة تانجبل و التى من شأنها تضم مجموعة من الشركات العاملة فى قطاعات عدة.

Nous comprenons combien il peut être difficile de naviguer dans un monde financier complexe, où de nouveaux produits et opportunités d’investissement apparaissent chaque jour. Vous êtes peut-être également préoccupés par la préparation de votre retraite ou par la transmission de votre patrimoine, sans trouver de conseils véritablement adaptés à votre situation.

C’est pourquoi, chez LV Finance Conseil, nous nous engageons à vous offrir bien plus qu’un simple produit financier. Notre mission est de mettre en place une stratégie personnalisée qui s’appuie sur trois piliers fondamentaux :

Un accompagnement personnalisé
Nous établissons le lien entre votre situation personnelle, votre profil et vos objectifs. Ensemble, nous analysons vos projets de vie, définissons des cibles claires et posons les jalons d’un avenir serein.

Donner du sens à vos actions
Chaque recommandation est le fruit d’une compréhension globale de votre situation. Nous vous expliquons en détail chaque étape, afin que vous agissiez en toute confiance et que chaque investissement devienne un levier vers la réalisation de vos rêves.

Une relation de confiance
Votre satisfaction est au cœur de nos préoccupations. Nous bâtissons avec vous une relation durable, fondée sur l’écoute, le dialogue ouvert et la transparence, pour vous accompagner tout au long de votre parcours financier.
Si vous êtes prêts à transformer vos ambitions en réalité,contactez-nous !

Contáctame por WhatsApp!    https://bit.ly/3vKUs2a o Agenda en mi calendario!   https://bit.ly/3bB5cJy

Es importante que sepas algunos puntos:

1. Como tu asesor Financiero puedo ser un gran recurso cuando se trata de tomar decisiones financieras fundamentales.

2. Puedo ayudarte a planificar tu futuro y asegurarme de que estés bien asesorado para alcanzar tus metas financieras. 

3. Puedo asesorarte sobre una variedad de temas, que incluyen ahorro, inversiones, planes personales de retiro, capitalización, planificación patrimonial, planes con beneficios fiscales, etc.

4. Te ayudo a tener una visión más allá de lo que tú mismo posiblemente no hayas visto.

5. Estoy registrado en la CNSF.

Hay diferentes formas de llamar a un asesor, los puedes encontrar como asesor en finanzas personales, asesor financiero, coach financiero, planificador financiero, asesor patrimonial, consultor financiero, orientador financiero, mentor financiero, guía financiero, etc. 

Tener un asesor financiero, es como tener un médico de cabecera.
En el año 2016 tuve mi primer acercamiento al mundo de las inversiones, conociendo a una experta Asesora Financiera, que me apoyo a comprender el correcto manejo de mis Finanzas Personales, mostrándome mis alternativas de ahorro e inversión. La forma de hacer un presupuesto y la importancia de conocer a detalle mis ingresos y en qué gastaba ese ingreso.

Além disso, a Consultoria e Assessoria Júnior de Economia desempenha um papel crucial na promoção do serviço à comunidade. Por meio de projetos de consultoria, workshops educacionais e outras iniciativas, a organização busca não apenas beneficiar seus membros, mas também impactar positivamente a sociedade em geral. Seu compromisso com a responsabilidade social é evidente em cada projeto realizado, pois priorizam soluções que não apenas atendam às necessidades de seus clientes, mas também tenham um impacto positivo mais amplo em sua comunidade.

Led by Paul H. Graham, we share the blueprint he wishes he had earlier: insights from his own journey, lessons from entrepreneurs who’ve exited 7–9 figure companies, and wisdom from billionaires who reshaped how we see money.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮’𝐥𝐥 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞:
Stories that clarify your relationship with money
Tax strategies that have unlocked millions for clients
Family office playbooks for growing and stewarding wealth across generations

After climbing the mountain of income, status, and meaning, Paul realized the summit wasn’t about more—it was about joy. By releasing expectations and focusing on impact, he discovered the true purpose of wealth: freedom, fulfillment, and contribution.

This philosophy comes to life in Paul’s upcoming book, The Investor’s Guide to Joy, a guide to aligning financial strategy with your financial heart.

Name: Mahmut'a sor SuriyeVizyonu
Description:
Geleceği şekillendirmek isteyenler için, Suriye'yi bugünden tanımanın tam zamanı.
Bu sayfa, Suriye'nin yükselen ekonomisine adım atmak isteyen Türk yatırımcılar için hazırlanmış stratejik bir rehberdir.

 Yatırım Danışmanlığı:
Suriye’de şirket kurmaktan sektör seçimine, yerel ortaklıklardan yasal süreçlere kadar ihtiyaç duyduğunuz tüm yönlendirmeleri sağlıyoruz.

 Rehber İçerikler:
Adım adım anlatımlarla; nereden başlamalı, hangi bölgeler cazip, nelere dikkat etmeli… Hepsi sade ve uygulamaya dönük içeriklerle.

 Gerçek Analizler:
Saha verilerine, resmi kaynaklara ve iş dünyasından alınan doğrudan bilgilere dayalı analizlerle, söylentilerden uzak net bir bakış sunuyoruz.

Suriye Vizyonu, yatırım için geç değil, erken olduğunu bilenler içindir.

Name: CMP - Carbon Metrics Project
Description:
Buscamos desenvolver metodologias inovadoras no âmbito da tomada de decisão, visando investidores e corporações comprometidos com a sustentabilidade. Combinando variáveis quantitativas e qualitativas, identificamos oportunidades com impacto significativo na redução de emissões e viabilidade financeira. Nosso objetivo é ser referência em análise de projetos de de otimização de produção, descarbonização e de créditos de carbono, promovendo um mercado transparente e eficiente, impulsionado pelo impacto ambiental positivo e seguindo regulamentações internacionais.
Nossas análises rigorosas consideram aspectos técnicos, econômicos e ambientais. Facilitamos a comparação entre alternativas, visando o custo-benefício, escalabilidade e impacto ambiental. Com isso, os investidores podem tomar decisões embasadas em dados, minimizando riscos e maximizando oportunidades para avançar rumo à sustentabilidade e combatendo as mudanças climáticas.

Name: Family Wealth Strategy w Adam Hoffman
Description:
The term “family office” is burgeoning in large part because of the wealth management industry’s interest in profiting from generational family wealth. 

The question “do I need a family office?” is misleading. The key question is “what resources do I need to achieve my family wealth goals?” 

Family wealth strategy is as critical to family success as strategy is to business success. A focus on tactics like investment management and insurance is akin to building a business with tactics in mind like operations and sales. 

What is critical, and what is the focus of our Family Wealth Strategic Review, is understanding how family champions can improve their leadership of family wealth. Leadership, a clear perspective on the family wealth’s purpose, is necessary to build an effective family wealth strategy. 

This is how to build meaningful family legacies.

There are over 50 tactics-level topics within family wealth. These tactics can only be properly lead by family wealth stewards once the strategy is set. Only once the family’s goals are clear, the objectives set out, the tradeoffs within family legacies examined, and the roles of the various family wealth advisors properly understood. 

This is the key tool in maximizing your chance at leading a successful family for generations to come.

We help Christian families steward their wealth in a way that's both God-honoring and financially excellent.

If you've worked hard to build real wealth, you've probably noticed something frustrating: financial advisors who either share your faith but don't deliver the level of sophistication you need, or advisors who are excellent at their craft but don't understand that stewardship matters to you. It's a bad trade-off, and it leaves you wondering if you're getting the excellence your family deserves.

With cookie-cutter portfolios and salespeople focused on commissions instead of your best interests, it's easy to end up with advice that doesn't actually fit your life, your values, or your goals.

This is why Remnant Wealth exists.

As a fee-only fiduciary, we're legally bound to put your interests first—no commissions, no conflicts, just excellent work.

Our process starts with understanding where you currently are and where you want to go. Then we build comprehensive financial plans, manage investments with discipline, and help you make decisions that honor both your values and your future. Retirement planning, tax efficiency, investment management, legacy building—we dig into the details and do the work right.

Excellent advice for faithful stewardship. It's what you deserve.

Name: Incompay Chile
Description:
"Somos una empresa especializada en la recuperación de dineros por pagos en exceso en entidades previsionales."
Sabemos que, a lo largo del tiempo, es posible que hayas realizado pagos en exceso a tu entidad previsional sin darte cuenta. Esto puede deberse a diversos factores, como cambios en la legislación, errores administrativos o falta de información clara por parte de la entidad. 
Nosotros entendemos lo frustrante que puede ser darse cuenta de que has pagado más de lo necesario y que ese dinero podría haber sido utilizado en otras áreas importantes de tu vida. Es por eso que nos especializamos en brindarte la solución que necesitas para recuperar esos pagos en exceso.
Queremos que sepas que no estás solo en esta situación,  muchas personas se encuentran en la misma posición y confían en nosotros para obtener la compensación que les corresponde. Nuestro objetivo es brindarte tranquilidad y seguridad financiera, ayudándote a recuperar esos pagos innecesarios y asegurándonos de que obtengas el reembolso que mereces.
Permítenos ser tu aliado en este proceso. Estamos aquí para brindarte el apoyo necesario y hacer todo el trabajo pesado por ti. Nuestro enfoque personalizado y nuestra dedicación nos distinguen, y nos esforzaremos para que tengas una experiencia fluida y exitosa en la recuperación de tu dinero.

Name: Ópos Investiments - EQI
Description:
A Ópos Investimentos é um escritório de assessoria financeira independente, especializado em planejamento patrimonial e investimentos de longo prazo.

Nosso propósito é ajudar pessoas e famílias a tomarem decisões financeiras mais racionais, seguras e alinhadas aos seus objetivos de vida — sempre com foco em proteção de patrimônio, eficiência na alocação de capital e disciplina no processo de investimento.

Atuamos com um modelo de atendimento consultivo, no qual o cliente não recebe apenas recomendações pontuais de produtos, mas sim um acompanhamento estruturado, baseado em:
	•	Diagnóstico completo do perfil e da situação financeira
	•	Definição clara de objetivos (curto, médio e longo prazo)
	•	Construção de uma estratégia de alocação personalizada
	•	Monitoramento contínuo e ajustes conforme o cenário e a vida do cliente evoluem

Acreditamos que investir bem não é prever o mercado, mas construir processos sólidos, controlar riscos e manter consistência ao longo do tempo.

Por isso, nossa atuação é guiada por três pilares:

1. Racionalidade – decisões baseadas em dados, teoria financeira e gestão de risco.
2. Personalização – cada cliente tem uma estratégia própria, não uma carteira padrão.
3. Disciplina – foco em longo prazo, evitando ruídos, modismos e impulsividade.

Nosso compromisso é com a qualidade técnica, a transparência e a construção de relações duradouras.

Investir bem é não errar ao longo do caminho. Isso é o que fazemos todos os dias.

Name: AETERNUS For Doctors | Gestão de Finanças + Investimentos + Patrimônio para Médicos
Description:
Aeternus For Doctors é a vertical exclusiva da Aeternus Wealth Partners desenhada para médicos que exigem muito mais do que uma simples carteira de investimentos. Imagine um Multi Family Office que entende a sua rotina, respeita seu propósito e nunca cobra comissões que enviesem suas escolhas.

**E se existisse um modelo de gestão patrimonial 100% independente, pensado sob medida para quem cuida da vida?** É isso que fazemos: combinamos tecnologia de ponta, governança de alta complexidade e uma rede de especialistas em investimentos, tributação, compliance e sucessão familiar — tudo orientado pelo seu perfil de risco e pelos seus sonhos de longo prazo.

Enquanto a assessoria convencional costuma oferecer “soluções” atreladas a interesses de rentabilidade de produtos, o nosso Multi Family Office coloca você no centro. Identificamos 13 pilares que influenciam sua segurança e bem-estar financeiro — do fluxo de caixa à estruturação de patrimônio, passando por proteção de ativos e eficiência tributária — e criamos quatro caixas de investimento (dia a dia, reserva de emergência, construção de patrimônio e fase de desfrute) afinadas ao seu momento de vida.

Mas não paramos por aí: estendemos nossa expertise para a gestão da sua clínica ou consultório, implementando práticas de governança corporativa, monitorando indicadores de desempenho e oferecendo mentoria executiva para elevar sua operação ao próximo nível.

O resultado? Uma jornada de independência financeira sem conflitos de interesse, com transparência total sobre custos, estratégias e instituições (você escolhe onde manter seus ativos).

 **Quer descobrir como os maiores players do mercado médico estão transformando seu patrimônio em legado?** Agende uma conversa e conheça o modelo que está redefinindo o conceito de liberdade financeira na medicina.

Aeternus For Doctors: seu patrimônio, sua escolha, seu legado.

Name: Business Lender
Description:
As the Founder and Lead Facilitator at BusinessLender Ltd, I specialize in bridging the gap between ambitious entrepreneurs and the capital they need to grow. With a base in London and a global reach, our firm is dedicated to connecting startups, SMEs, and established businesses with credible investors and loan providers worldwide.

My journey began with a vision: to simplify and streamline the funding process for businesses at every stage. Recognizing the challenges many face in accessing capital—be it due to complex application procedures, lack of connections, or stringent requirements—I established BusinessLender to offer a more accessible and transparent solution.

Over the years, I’ve cultivated a vast network of financial institutions, private investors, and alternative lenders. This network enables us to tailor funding solutions that align with each client’s unique needs, whether it’s seed funding for a startup, expansion capital for a growing enterprise, or bridge loans for short-term needs.

Our approach is client-centric. We begin by understanding your business model, goals, and challenges. From there, we craft a funding strategy, assist with documentation, and facilitate introductions to suitable financiers. Our commitment doesn’t end there; we provide ongoing support to ensure the funding process is smooth and beneficial.

Key achievements include:
	•	Successfully facilitated funding for over 200 businesses across various sectors, totaling more than £50 million.
	•	Maintained a 90% client satisfaction rate, with many returning for subsequent funding rounds.
	•	Built partnerships with over 100 financial entities, expanding our clients’ access to diverse funding sources.

Name: Atomos Real Estate
Description:
After accumulating nearly 14 years of real estate experience at DB, Gaw, and KKR, I have made the decision to embark on my own entrepreneurial journey. It gives me great pleasure to introduce "Atomos Real Estate". 

Today, we are living in an era where real estate may seem less favored among asset classes. However, with “unbreakable” principles and philosophy, real estate investing remains a cornerstone of portfolio construction. 

Just as the “atom” is an indivisible unit of an element, our ambition is to establish real estate ventures that adhere to “unwavering” principles and philosophy. We believe that by maintaining this integrity, exceptional investment solutions can be delivered to clients.

지난 14년 가까이 DB와 Gaw 그리고 KKR에서의 직장생활을 뒤로하고, 많은 고민 끝에 사업에 도전하기로 결심했습니다. 여러분께 "아토모스 리얼에스테이트 (Atomos Real Estate)"를 소개합니다. 

여러모로 부동산이 다양한 투자자들께 미운 오리 새끼가 되어있는 이 시기에, 엄격한 원칙과 단단한 철학을 기반으로 한 부동산 투자는 여전히 전체 포트폴리오의 일부로써의 존재의 의미가 있다고 생각합니다. 

원자는 더이상 쪼개지지 않는 입자를 의미합니다. 모험 앞에 물러서지 않고 패기있는 자세를 견지한 채, 절대로 깨지지 않는 원자와 같은 원칙과 철학으로 고객 분들께 멋진 투자 솔루션을 제공해보도록 노력하겠습니다.

Name: Nbimon
Description:
Norway’s oil fund, or the Government Pension Fund Global which is its official name, was created after we discovered oil in the North Sea. The fund was set up to shield the economy from ups and downs in oil revenue. It also serves as a financial reserve and as a long-term savings plan so that both current and future generations get to benefit from our oil wealth.
In 1969, one of the world’s largest offshore oilfields was discovered off Norway. Suddenly we had a lot of oil to sell, and the country’s economy grew dramatically. It was decided early on that revenue from oil and gas should be used cautiously in order to avoid imbalances in the economy. In 1990, the Norwegian parliament passed legislation to support this, creating what is now the Government Pension Fund Global, and the first money was deposited in the fund in 1996. As the name suggests, it was decided that the fund should only be invested abroad.

Comment prendre les meilleures décisions dans un environnement qui évolue en permanence, sans y passer des heures ? Comment s’y retrouver entre les produits d’épargne, d’assurance, et immobiliers ?

Depuis la création de Dynamis Conseil, nous accompagnons de nombreux clients dans la création et l’optimisation de leurs patrimoines, en accord avec leurs objectifs et contraintes.

Il y a de jeunes actifs à la recherche de solutions performantes pour se créer un patrimoine. Il y a des indépendants, chefs d’entreprise et professions libérales qui souhaitent optimiser leurs actifs professionnels et pérenniser leur train de vie. Il y a aussi ceux qui souhaitent lever le pied et récolter les fruits de leur travail dans les meilleures conditions.

Et nous sommes toujours à leurs côtés pour ajuster nos stratégies au fil du temps.

Ces stratégies s’organisent autour de 5 leviers :
- Les produits bancaires
- Les produits d’assurance
- L’immobilier
- La fiscalité
- Les aspects juridiques et civils

Comment combiner tout ça efficacement quand vous avez un banquier ou un assureur qui ne peut vous vendre que ses produits maison et n’a qu’une vision partielle de votre situation ?

Nous avons donc créé Dynamis Conseil autour de 3 axes : 
- Nous sommes multi-statuts (Conseiller financier, intermédiaire en assurances, agent immobilier et compétence juridique appropriée) afin de combiner les avantages de chacun de ces domaines
- Nous sommes indépendants (sur un modèle de courtage) afin de vous proposer les meilleurs produits du marché et les frais les plus faibles
- Nous appliquons une approche globale : nous faisons un état des lieux de votre situation, de vos contraintes et de vos objectifs, et nous vous proposons des solutions sur mesure en intégrant tous nos domaines d’expertise

Nous sommes à votre disposition pour vous renseigner sur nos services.
