Name: Elite Asset Management
Description:
Elite Asset Management est un cabinet de conseil indépendant en gestion de patrimoine, créé en 2001, par Jean-Philippe Pham. Fort de 30 ans d’expérience, son fondateur propose un conseil indépendant, transparent, global et sur-mesure.

Les solutions d’investissement proposées sont sélectionnées selon des critères purement qualitatifs, sans esprit partisan et avec une mise en concurrence des intervenants. Cette indépendance nous différencie d’un conseiller bancaire, obligé par son employeur de vendre les produits maison.  
Un conseil objectif se doit aussi d’être transparent sur les risques et la rémunération. Le risque nul n’existe pas, quel que soit l’investissement. C’est pourquoi nous exposons les avantages et les inconvénients, les garanties et les risques, de façon exhaustive.
Nous sommes aussi transparents sur notre rémunération. 2 modalités sont possibles : d’une part, les rétrocessions de commission par nos fournisseurs, sans aucun surcoût pour nos clients et d’autre part, les honoraires sur les missions de conseil ou en l’absence de rétrocession de commission.

Nous déclinons un conseil pluridisciplinaire pour offrir une approche patrimoniale globale et sur-mesure. Nos principaux domaines d’activité sont les suivants :
- conseil en investissement financier (private equity, assurance-vie, etc.) 
- optimisation fiscale (IR, IFI, droits de succession, IS) 
- transactions immobilières (vente, location, gestion) 
- biens divers (métaux précieux, antiquités, vin) 
- tours de table sur des opérations immobilières en marchand de biens

L’intuitu personae est au cœur de notre métier. Chaque client possède un interlocuteur dédié qui lui apport un suivi : 
-	Pour les actifs immobiliers : location, gestion, rénovation et revente 
-	Pour les actifs financiers : audits, comptes rendus et arbitrages 
-	Tableau de bord pour visualiser tout son patrimoine 
-	Bilans patrimoniaux  
-	Aide pour la déclaration d’impôt

Name: OptionTraders LLC
Description:
In un mondo governato dal sovraccarico di informazioni, riuscire a distinguere le informazioni di valore da quelle fuorvianti è un’impresa non banale.

La situazione si complica maggiormente nel campo degli investimenti e in particolare con le Opzioni, dove è facile perdersi in un mare di prodotti finanziari, strane nomenclature, miriadi di corsi, sedicenti promesse di ricchezza e, purtroppo, anche tanti impostori.

Da dove iniziare dunque? Come distinguere gli argomenti importanti da quelli superflui?

OptionTraders nasce dalla realizzazione che per il modo piú rapido ed efficace per imparare ad investire con le opzioni e approfondire le proprie conoscenze è di creare una comunità di traders con la stessa passione e voglia di migliorarsi a vicenda.

La possibilità di interagire con gli altri, scambiare idee sulle strategie confrontando le techniche operative, massimizza la comprensione di concetti avanzati d’investimento e garantisce un percorso operativo già testato, nella la consapevolezza di avere attorno un gruppo di esperti a cui dare ascolto.

Il nostro obiettivo è triplice:

1) Offrire un percorso di formazione efficace che sia accessibile a tutti i livelli, neofiti o esperti

2) Partiamo dal concetto di Safety First! : imparare a gestire i rischi e proteggere il capitale prima di tutto. Per imparare a guadagnare è fondamentale capire come non perdere!

3) Creare una comunità di traders esperti in grado di creare nuove strategie e adattarle alle condizioni di mercato

Name: VuValue
Description:
Posiadamy wieloletnie doświadczenie w pracy z inwestorami i deweloperami na rynku nieruchomości w całej Polsce. Nasi klienci to inwestorzy indywidualni, instytucjonalni - firmy z różnych branż, deweloperzy oraz podmioty zagraniczne działające m.in. w sektorach mieszkaniowym, PRS, biurowym, usługowym.

Oferujemy szeroki zakres usług, w tym:

 Przygotowanie inwestycji, zastępstwo inwestorskie: Zapewniamy kompleksowe wsparcie inwestycyjne, obejmujące wybór lokalizacji, raporty z badań technicznych i prawnych, ocenę potencjału inwestycyjnego, opracowanie koncepcji architektonicznych zgodnie z wymaganiami klienta oraz proces projektowania i uzyskiwania decyzji administracyjnych.

 Analizy i badania rynku nieruchomości: Przeprowadzamy dogłębne analizy rynkowe, dostarczając informacji i wskazówek, które pomagają naszym klientom podejmować decyzje inwestycyjne.

 Pozyskiwanie finansowania na zakup/budowę nieruchomości: Pomagamy klientom w znalezieniu odpowiednich źródeł finansowania i opracowujemy strategie pozyskiwania kapitału potrzebnego do realizacji ich projektów.

 Wyceny nieruchomości: Przeprowadzamy profesjonalne wyceny nieruchomości, oparte na rzetelnych analizach rynku, aby nasi klienci mieli pełny obraz wartości swoich nieruchomości.

 Doradztwo w zakresie nieruchomości: Oferujemy wszechstronne doradztwo dla klientów indywidualnych oraz inwestorów, pomagając im w podejmowaniu kluczowych decyzji dotyczących nieruchomości i inwestycji, zgodnie z ich potrzebami.

 Zarządzanie ryzykiem inwestycji i transakcji nieruchomościowych: Pomagamy podmiotom i osobom inwestującym w nieruchomości w identyfikacji, analizie i zarządzaniu ryzykiem, minimalizując potencjalne straty i zwiększając bezpieczeństwo inwestycji.

 Pośrednictwo w obrocie nieruchomościami: Prowadzimy procesy sprzedaży, zakupu, wynajmu i najmu nieruchomości, zapewniając naszym klientom skuteczne i bezpieczne transakcje.

Name: 1PointSix, LLC.
Description:
Modern capitalism is increasingly criticized for causing global warming and social inequity. Corporations are accused of failing to prioritize the interests of employees, suppliers, communities, and the environment, favoring instead, the short-term interests of their shareholders. But modern capitalism also deserves credit for dramatically reducing global poverty and improving literacy rates, infant mortality, nutrition, and access to health care. 

Socioeconomic progress over the past half-century has been beyond anything our forebears might have imagined. Any human born today faces better prospects for their health & well-being than anyone born before them. But this is not to say all economic and social injustices have been eradicated, nor that our current environmental trajectory is sustainable. Indeed, despite our age of unsurpassed abundance, why is it that:

3 in 10 people still lack access to safe drinking water
650 million youth lack basic math & literacy skills
Less than half the global population receives basic health services
800 Million students have no access to online learning
Two billion adults are excluded from formal financial services
40% of countries have fewer than 10 doctors per 10,000 people

The challenges of climate change and the unsustainable impact modern consumption patterns are having on our air, earth & water need to be addressed. Left unabated, future carbon emissions are certain to raise temperatures: the only questions are by how much & how fast. Combined with growing income disparities and declining levels of economic and social mobility in many societies, ubiquitous peace and prosperity are far from secure for generations to come. 

These are the stakes. 

Nothing less than more inclusive, sustainable economic growth will provide for the needs of future generations. And the best role investors can play in financing the future we need is to embrace the 1.6 percent solution.

Name: y-art
Description:
Mi presento. Sono Claudio Russo e sono un Art Advisor.
Un consulente, o meglio un consigliere nel mondo dell'arte.
Un esperto che prende per mano il collezionista e lo guida nella scelta.
Che sia per passione, che sia per investimento, sapere di essere uno strategico supporto nei consigli e nel controllo dei processi di compravendita è impagabile.

 Vuoi iniziare la tua collezione perchè ami l'arte ma hai paura di investire male i tuoi risparmi?
 Vuoi consolidare i tuoi investimenti rimettendo sul mercato le opere in tuo possesso, cercando di ottenere il più possibile, assecondando il mercato, per poter acquistare opere di più alto valore?
 Vuoi diversificare i tuoi investimenti con opere che possono, dopo pochi anni, avere delle plusvalenze interessanti?
 Vuoi un'opera di prestigio che possa mantenere il suo valore nel tempo? 
 Vuoi acquistare una specifica opera di uno specifico artista ma non sai come fare?

Questo è il mio lavoro.
Grazie ad un fitto network di professionisti che gravitano nel mondo dell'arte, posso offrire la soluzione migliore alle richieste che mi vengono fatte. Tutte le opere sono sempre autenticate e certificate, sia che si tratti di artisti emergenti, che di storicizzati.

Se hai mal di denti, vai dal tuo dentista o ti affidi a Wikipedia?
Se devi riparare l'auto vai dal meccanico di fiducia o cerchi i tutorial su Youtube?
Per comprare un'opera d'arte devi fare la stessa cosa: affidarti ad un professionista del settore.

Quindi  SCRIVIMI ORA IN CHAT  per avere maggiori informazioni sulla mia attività ed insieme capiamo come posso aiutarti.

De wereld om ons heen verandert in hoog tempo. Dat betekent voor bedrijven en hun adviseurs dat vraagstukken en besluitvorming steeds complexer worden. En dat, voor een compleet antwoord op dergelijke ingewikkelde vraagstukken, steeds vaker meerdere specialismen nodig zijn. Dat vraagt om efficiënte samenwerking en korte informatielijnen tussen specialisten. 

Vanuit dat perspectief is Hét Kennisnetwerk ontstaan.

Hét Kennisnetwerk bestaat uit verschillende professionals met ieder hun eigen expertise en jarenlange ervaring binnen de zakelijke dienstverlening. We werken onafhankelijk van elkaar, maar delen onze kennis. Tijdens onze maandelijkse bijeenkomsten praten we elkaar bij over marktontwikkelingen en actualiteiten uit het eigen vakgebied. 

Deze gedeelde kennis maakt een bredere visie mogelijk op de vraagstukken van onze afzonderlijke opdrachtgevers. En door onze verbondenheid in Hét Kennisnetwerk zijn de lijnen kort; we kunnen, als de omstandigheden erom vragen, snel (en proactief) de expertise inzetten van een van de andere specialisten. Name: ALLURE Gestion Privée
Description:
Le nom du cabinet ALLURE Gestion Privée s'inspire des allures de bateau, un concept maritime qui désigne la manière dont un navire avance en fonction du vent et des courants.

 Tout comme un bateau ajuste ses voiles pour naviguer efficacement, nous adoptons nos stratégies en fonction des conditions économiques et des besoins changeants de nos clients.
 Une allure bien choisie assure une navigation stable et sécurisée, tout comme notre expertise garantit une gestion patrimoniale solide et pérenne.
 En mer, chaque allure mène à une destination précise. De même, notre cabinet guide nos clients vers leurs objectifs patrimoniaux avec précision et détermination.
 Le terme "allure" évoque également une certaine fluidité, reflétant l'approche professionnelle et transparente de notre cabinet.

Le cabinet Allure Gestion Privée a été fondé dans l’objectif de répondre aux besoins spécifiques d’une clientèle exigeante, composée de chefs d’entreprise, de particuliers, de professions libérales et de cadres dirigeants. Depuis sa création, Allure Gestion Privée s’est distingué par son approche personnalisée et attentive, mettant un point d’honneur à comprendre les enjeux uniques de chaque client. À l’écoute de leurs aspirations et préoccupations, le cabinet les accompagne durablement à chaque étape de la vie de leur patrimoine.

Name: Effedue Valuations
Description:
Effedue Valuations: i nostri numeri, i tuoi obiettivi.
Effedue Valuations, fin dall’anno 2016 (data della sua costituzione) ha sempre incrementato il volume delle pratiche gestite nel corso degli anni, passando da circa 6.000 retail nel 2016 ad oltre 20.000 unità nell’anno appena trascorso. A tali volumi vanno aggiunte inoltre le pratiche corporate, gestite da un team interno dedicato, e dall’anno 2018 una media di circa 2000 pratiche NPL. Numeri che attestano il trend in crescita da una parte, ma che più di ogni altra cosa confermano la validità del principio attuato e delle scelte operative – alcune estremamente coraggiose – messe in campo e perseguite con dedizione.

Gli investimenti immobiliari costituiscono oggigiorno una parte significativa dei portafogli di molti investitori: intercettare il giusto valore di mercato di tali asset, in modo univoco, rappresenta un target di vitale importanza per i detentori di tali portafogli. La sicurezza della definizione del corretto market value, anche nella differenziazione tipologica dei tipi di asset, è una sfida che permette di fare la differenza.

Persone

Name: Moker Energie
Description:
Per 1 januari 2021 is de regelgeving voor het energielabel voor woningen gewijzigd. Vanaf die datum moet u voor een energielabel een energieadviseur inschakelen, welke bij u thuis langskomt om uw woning te inspecteren. Deze verandering in de wetgeving en de grote vraag naar energieadviseurs heeft Moker Vastgoed doen besluiten om haar vastgoedbeheer uit te breiden met een energietak; 'Moker Energie'. Per begin 2022 zijn wij officieel gecertificeerd als EP-W/B bedrijf.

Al onze adviseurs zijn deskundige EP-W/B adviseurs als het gaat om het verkrijgen van een energielabel.

Al sinds 2005 is Moker Vastgoed actief op de vastgoedmarkt.

Sinds 2022 zijn we ons gaan specialiseren in energielabels voor woningen en appartementen, hieruit is de naam Moker Energie ontstaan.

We werken voornamelijk in de regio west- en midden Nederland, maar kunnen op verzoek uiteraard ook elders in het land voor u een energielabel verzorgen.

Deskundigheid en persoonlijke aandacht staan bij Moker Energie hoog in het vaandel. Wij helpen u graag bij het verkrijgen van een energielabel.

Name: Aria Capital Group
Description:
Welkom bij Aria Capital Group! Ontdek de toekomst van investeren in vastgoed met ons. 

Aria Capital is een dynamische speler in de vastgoedsector, die zich richt op vastgoedbeleggingen en financieringen. Met een scherp oog voor kansen in de markt, werkt Aria Capital samen met diverse projectontwikkelaars om nieuwe projecten aan te trekken. Deze samenwerkingen zijn cruciaal, niet alleen voor het ontwikkelen van vastgoed, maar ook voor het vinden van private equity en de juiste eindbeleggers. Dit omvat een breed scala aan investeerders, van fondsen en vastgoedmagnaten tot andere ontwikkelaars, die geïnteresseerd zijn in het wegzetten van de ontwikkelde projecten.

In een tijd waarin de vraag naar unieke investeringsmogelijkheden toeneemt, richt Aria Capital zich ook op het aanbieden van off-market vastgoed. Dit zijn vastgoedobjecten die niet openbaar worden aangeboden, wat investeerders de kans biedt om te profiteren van exclusieve deals. Aria Capital fungeert hierbij als bemiddelaar, die koper en verkoper op een efficiënte manier samenbrengt.

Door middel van een zorgvuldig geselecteerd portfolio, biedt Aria Capital investeringsmogelijkheden met aantrekkelijke rentepercentages en sterke onderpanden. Dit stelt beleggers in staat om niet alleen rendement te behalen, maar ook te investeren in vastgoedprojecten met een solide basis. Met een focus op kwaliteit en samenwerking, positioneert Aria Capital zich als een betrouwbare partner in de vastgoedmarkt.
Location: Capelle aan den IJssel, South Holland

Name: Kb-Conseils & Patrimoine
Description:
KB Conseils se distingue par son approche innovante dans le domaine de la gestion de patrimoine.
Notre mission principale est de rendre cet aspect accessible à tous. Forts de 20 ans d'expérience, nous proposons des conseils véritablement indépendants. Grâce à une compréhension approfondie des besoins de nos clients, notre cabinet établit une relation durable fondée sur la confiance et l'empathie.

Nous accordons une grande importance à la préparation de la retraite et à l'optimisation de la succession.
Nous privilégions une écoute attentive pour élaborer des stratégies sur mesure, qui protègent les intérêts familiaux tout en veillant à la sécurité financière des générations futures. Chaque conseil que nous prodiguons est ajusté en fonction des évolutions économiques, fiscales et juridiques du moment.

Dans le cadre de nos services, notre cabinet propose une gamme complète de solutions financières, incluant l'optimisation fiscale, l'investissement stratégique et l'assurance. Nous analysons votre situation actuelle afin de définir une stratégie patrimoniale durable, en accord avec vos aspirations à long terme. Notre volonté de comprendre prime sur celle de convaincre, comme en témoigne notre devise.

Les professionnels de KB Conseils prennent le temps d'expliquer leurs recommandations de manière claire et compréhensible.
Chaque décision est prise en concertation avec le client, garantissant ainsi une démarche collaborative et transparente. Notre expertise en conseil financier, associée à des diplômes en ingénierie patrimoniale, reflète notre capacité à offrir un accompagnement de qualité.

Les services proposés par le cabinet KB Conseils :

Optimisation de la fiscalité

Préparation de la retraite

Stratégies d'épargne personnalisées

Conseils en investissement stratégiques

Gestion de succession adaptée à chaque famille

Name: Victory Road Advisors LLC
Description:
Andrew Parrillo's vision after many years in the investment industry is that the asset-based fee model is not necessarily in the best interest of clients, and he advocates a fixed fee for planning and strategy advice. There is no need to pay an advisor multiple times for the same advice, which typically advocates staying invested for the long term.

Institutions have for many years engaged consultants to assist them with investment planning, strategy, asset allocation, portfolio selection, and monitoring. He brings the institutional consulting and coaching approach that he practiced to individual investors with his new firm. (The office address for his former firms was 500 Victory Road; thus the firm name.)

We empower individual investors by offering institutional-level investment advice and coaching at a fixed fee.

We believe in putting you in control, providing transparency, and optimizing your investment costs to help you reach your financial goals with confidence and peace of mind.

Experience the benefits of institutional-informed investment advice and personal coaching tailored to your individual needs. We offer only non-discretionary advice and do not accept trading authority or custody of your assets.

We break the mold of traditional ongoing investor advisor fees by offering cost and tax-efficient investing with flat fees. Our clients are always in charge, and we are available for consultations and portfolio check-ins as needed.

Our unique risk assessment process helps investors determine their risk score based on an analysis of their existing portfolio and their specific risk preferences in dollar terms over short and longer-term horizons.

Description:
Descomplica Investimento é uma empresa de análise e consultoria financeira com sede em São Paulo – SP, que aproxima investidores e empresas do mercado por meio de conteúdo, dados e inteligência.

Com o lema "A Bolsa de Valores sem segredos para você!", oferecemos soluções completas para quem investe e para quem lidera negócios, unindo educação financeira, análise de ativos, cobertura setorial e estratégias personalizadas.

 Para investidores (B2C):
Publicamos conteúdos e relatórios com foco em renda fixa, ações, fundos imobiliários, dividendos, derivativos, ESG e estratégias de carteira. Ajudamos iniciantes e investidores experientes a tomarem decisões com confiança e embasamento técnico.

 Para empresas (B2B):
Prestamos consultoria para empresas de diversos setores, com foco em inteligência de mercado, posicionamento estratégico, cobertura de empresas listadas, estudos de caso e preparação para o mercado de capitais. Atuamos com destaque em commodities, cadeias produtivas e setores estratégicos da economia, sem limitar nosso escopo a um único segmento.

 Nossas soluções contam com tecnologia e inteligência artificial, oferecendo painéis analíticos, relatórios automatizados e estudos preditivos. Entregamos valor tanto para investidores quanto para executivos que buscam decisões financeiras mais seguras e alinhadas com o cenário macroeconômico.

Quelques problématiques que j’aide à résoudre:

→ Vous avez une épargne importante ou reçu un héritage? Je propose des stratégies sur mesure pour maximiser vos rendements.

2. Transmission patrimoniale :

3. Préparation de la retraite :

4. Réduction des impôts :

5. Cession et transmission d’entreprises :

Name: MBRE Investiční nemovitosti
Description:
Investiční byty k pronájmu s kompletní správou a garantovaným nájemným od 800.000 Kč.

Každý den vyhledáváme pro naše investory z celé České republiky a Slovenska nové nemovitosti, které splňují příležitost dobré finanční investice. Přečtěte si náš příběh.

Rádi vám zprostředkujeme nákup a následnou správu nemovitostí, nejčastěji pak bytové jednotky, pro dlouhodobou investici (k pronájmu). Ceny v Moravskoslezském kraji jsou místy ještě stále příznivé a umožňují tak chránit vaše finance před rostoucí inflací a dalšími nepříznivými vlivy.

O nás ...

V realitní branži pracují zakladatelé "Investičních nemovitostí" od roku 2008, kde začínali jako realitní makléři menší realitní kanceláře. To jim bylo teprve 19 let a rychle se pro tuto práci nadchli. Od začátku jejich kariéry až doposud si prošli snad celou realitní kariérou. Od realitního makléře, vedoucího týmu, ředitele až po majitele několika realitních kanceláří pod mezinárodní značkou.

Z klasické realitní činnosti začali postupně, původně dva mladí manželé, rozšířovat své aktivity, a to od rekonstrukcí malých bytových jednotek po rekonstrukce rodinných domů. Až nakonec dospěli k projektu "Investičních nemovitostí", kterého si velice považují a berou jej jako své „malé miminko“, které se narodilo z tvrdě nasbíraných zkušeností.


Postupem času se tým dvou lidí rozrostl o další partnery z řad investorů, architektů, stavařů, topenářů, elektrikářů až po odborníky na energetikua. V roce 2016 začal nakonec vystupovat pod obchodním názvem MBRE Investiční nemovitosti. Následně v roce 2021 převzal společnost MB real estate s.r.o., která nyní obchodní název MBRE Investiční nemovitosti vlastní a provozuje. 
 
Velice rádi se osobně, telefonicky nebo alespoň e-mailem potkáme s každým potencionálním investorem, který by se chtěl o projektu MBRE Investiční nemovitosti dozvědět více a případně investovat své aktiva chytře, do bezpečných projektů naší společnosti.

Name: Votre49-3
Description:
Votre 49‑3 – Protégez votre épargne, sécurisez votre avenir 

Votre épargne est aujourd’hui exposée à des risques légaux et systémiques peu connus :
loi Sapin2 (blocage des retraits), directive BRRD (ponction sur les comptes bancaires), limites du Fonds de Garantie (livrets)  ￼.

Votre 49‑3, c’est un programme stratégique complet, basé sur plus de 100 heures de recherche terrain , qui vous permet de :
	•	Comprendre les vraies menaces : analyses juridiques sourcées, explications claires sur les mécanismes de saisie et les vulnérabilités du système financier actuel  ￼.
	•	Construire un portefeuille anti-saisie : répartir les actifs selon 6 check-lists pratiques, diversifier efficacement, structurer avec les bons prestataires pour limiter les risques  ￼.
	•	Choisir le bon environnement juridique : comparatif entre courtiers selon le droit applicable, la protection des titres et la sécurité juridique .
	•	Optimiser fiscalité & transmission : anticiper pour alléger l’impôt, sécuriser le patrimoine, transmettre dans les meilleures conditions  ￼.
	•	Rester informé en continu : accès au groupe Telegram pendant 12 mois, avec analyses macro-économiques et points de vigilance mensuels  ￼.

 Un guide PDF structuré (compréhension, bouclier financier, portefeuille, fiscalité)
 6 fiches opérationnelles à actionner immédiatement
 Comparatif clair et détaillé de courtiers fiables
 Un soutien et une communauté active via Telegram

Le tout pour un tarif unique de 49,03€ — un clin d’œil aux 23 recours au 49.3 en 14 mois  ￼.

⸻

Pourquoi suivre Votre 49‑3 ?
- Vous reprenez le contrôle complet de votre argent, sans dépendre de banques ou de conseils conflictuels.
- Vous transformez des risques invisibles en opportunités de structuration patrimoniale robuste.
- Vous agissez, avant que les crises frappent.

 Téléchargez un extrait gratuit et découvrez comment protéger concrètement votre épargne :
www.votre49‑3.fr

Name: Covered Call Research
Description:
At CoveredCallResearch, we combine disciplined analytics with practical investing principles to help individuals generate consistent income through a structured 30-day covered call strategy.

Our mission is to bring clarity, consistency, and confidence to income investing — not hype or speculation. Every report we publish is built on data, probabilities, and structure, not opinion.

Each week, subscribers receive research highlighting covered call opportunities with expirations roughly 30 days out — the sweet spot for balancing return and risk.
Our proprietary ranking and scoring system analyzes multiple option metrics such as bid %, delta, and return if called %, creating a clear framework investors can use to evaluate and plan with discipline.

We don’t tell anyone what to buy or sell. Instead, we share the same process and methodology we use — empowering investors to make their own decisions using reliable, structured research.

Whether you’re a retiree looking for steady income, a self-directed investor seeking better structure, or simply someone who values data over emotion, CoveredCallResearch is designed to help you think like a strategist — not a speculator.

What We Offer

 Weekly Research Reports — Data-driven covered call insights built on a 30-day cycle
 Two Subscription Plans — Basic (Top 10 List) & Advanced (Full Excel Report)
 Educational Insights — Explaining the logic behind every ranked opportunity
 Cancel Anytime — 30-day refund policy for new subscribers

Our Philosophy

Structure beats emotion.

Data drives decisions.

Consistency builds confidence.

At CoveredCallResearch, our goal is simple — to help investors replace guesswork with grounded research and build steady income, one 30-day cycle at a time.

Website: www.CoveredCallResearch.com

Description:
¿Quienes somos? 
Somos una compañía que ofrecemos servicios de asesoría financiera, específicamente en todo lo referente a inversiones, ofreciendo soluciones para un amplio sector de la población. Acercamos los beneficios de los grandes inversionistas a casi cualquier persona que lo desee.

¿Cuál es nuestro propósito?

Nuestro propósito es sembrar cultura financiera en nuestro país y Latinoamérica, acercando las mejores oportunidades de inversión que conlleven buen rendimiento y bajo riesgo para nuestros clientes, buscando generar tranquilidad, equilibrio y libertad financiera.

PRODUCTO

¿En qué mercado operamos?

Operamos por medio de FOREX (Foreing Currencies Exchange) o mercado de divisas con las siguientes características:
 
-Mercado más grande del mundo 
-Opera 24 horas los 5 días de la semana 
-El volumen de divisas que se negocia internacionalmente, con un promedio diario de 5.345 billones de dólares, operando en un día lo que Wall Street puede llegar a operar en un mes en el mercado bursátil.-Las transacciones diarias hacen que suba o baje de acuerdo a la oferta y la demanda, así como eventos relevantes
-La liquidez extrema del mercado
-El gran número y variedad de los intervinientes
-Su dispersión geográfica.

Actualmente trabajamos de la mano de distintos proveedores que emplean estrategia de trading únicas incorporando (HFT) High Frequency Trading.

 En définitive, vous sera proposée une pharmacopée de solutions (juridiques et/ou financières) personnalisées, adaptatives et toujours diversifiées.

Soyez curieux de sortir des sentiers battus, permettez-vous l'accès à une vision indépendante, globale et professionnelle de votre patrimoine.

Name: Terra Nossa Incorporadora Agrícola
Description:
A TERRA NOSSA é uma das maiores empresas brasileiras de investimentos em COMMODITIES agrícolas e terras agricultáveis e com foco na negociação, desenvolvimento, exploração, valorização e comercialização de propriedades rurais com aptidão agropecuária.

Acreditamos que propriedades rurais possam ter um significativo potencial de geração de valor por meio da manutenção de ativo e do desenvolvimento de atividades agropecuárias rentáveis durante este processo de valorização.

Buscamos implementar culturas de maior valor agregadoe transformar propriedades rurais com investimentos em infraestrutura e tecnologia, aumentando consideravelmente sua produtividade e valorização.

O nosso plano de negócio contempla o retorno de investimentos sobre a gestão de negociação de commodities agrícolas e também da valorização de propriedades rurais, tendo em vista a geração e produção de commodities agrícolas. Name: Biz Women Invest
Description:
Introducing Biz Women Invest: Empowering Women Entrepreneurs! 

At Biz Women, we’ve spent over five years building a vibrant community of resilient, innovative women in business. Now, we’re excited to introduce Biz Women Invest – a dedicated platform designed to connect women entrepreneurs with funding, mentorship, and resources to thrive.

What is Biz Women Invest?
Biz Women Invest bridges the gap for women entrepreneurs, addressing challenges in funding and support. Our mission is to connect female founders with investors, foster financial confidence, and create an ecosystem where collaboration drives success.

For Founders:
 Investment Guidance to prepare for funding rounds.
 Market Insights tailored to your industry.
 Financial Planning for sustainable growth.
 Mentorship to navigate challenges and scale effectively.

For Investors:

 Access to Women-Led Ventures with high potential.
 Networking Opportunities with like-minded investors.
 Impact-Driven Partnerships to champion diverse leadership.

Why Biz Women Invest?
Despite the exceptional results women-led businesses achieve, they receive only a fraction of venture funding. Biz Women Invest is here to change that. With over 5000 members in the Biz Women community, this initiative builds on our legacy of celebrating and supporting women in business.

The Soft Launch
Biz Women Invest was officially introduced at the Biz Women Awards 2024, where entrepreneurs, allies, and investors came together to support this transformative initiative. The event showcased our commitment to reshaping entrepreneurship for women.

How to Get Involved

Entrepreneurs: Access resources, tools, and connections to grow.
Investors: Champion women-led businesses and drive impact.
Community Members: Support and share our vision.

Together, we’re creating a future where women-led businesses can thrive. Learn more at BizWomenInvest.com

#BizWomenInvest #WomenInBusiness #Entrepreneur #Funding #investment #bizwomen #investor

Investeringsprofil:
Vi investerer i relevante brands og virksomheder, hvor vi kan se at vi kan gøre en positiv og mærkbar forskel for dem. Vi vil være med “på rejsen” og investerer ikke blot for at få et økonomisk afkast, og forventer derfor at være som minimum med på sidelinjen i form af vores ejerskab. Allerhelst vil vi bidrage med de kompetencer som vi har siddende i Munch Sørensen Holding, da vi ved at vi har virkelig dygtige og erfarne folk hos os. Vi er en aktiv partner og vi kommer med både evner, erfaring, knowhow, tid og ikke mindst hjerte og sjæl, som vi selv betegner som passion for det vi laver. 

Vi investerer sjældent i brands og forretninger som kun ønsker økonomisk hjælp af os.

Fort de ce constat, il nous semble important de pouvoir apporter une réponse qualitative tant sur le plan de l'investissement qui représente notre cœur de métier que sur d'autres angles essentiels de la gestion de patrimoine.

Il est aujourd'hui de plus en plus difficile de se constituer un patrimoine et beaucoup d'outils méconnus du grand public permettent d'optimiser la fiscalité, la structuration ou la transmission de la richesse accumulée.

Notre rôle est de vous les partager dans le cadre d'une approche de long terme.

Ce faisant, nous souhaitons instaurer et restaurer une confiance envers ce métier parfois entaché par des conseils inadaptés. Notre accompagnement se caractérise par une réelle technicité, une implication dans le temps, de la simplicité et de l'efficacité tant sur l'explication que dans l’application.

Name: Castling.me
Description:
A Castling nasceu da filosofia de uma jogada no xadrez capaz de unir defesa e ataque numa só movimentação: o roque. Assim como o rei e a torre agem em sinergia para proteger o monarca e preparar uma ofensiva estratégica, nossa essência está em combinar solidez e ousadia para oferecer análises e soluções financeiras inovadoras.

Fundada por Gustavo Luis Massotti e Otávio Augusto Ferrari Pedro, a Castling traz duas visões complementares sobre investimentos:

- Gustavo Luis Massotti é Analista CNPI com ampla experiência e histórico comprovado de superar o Ibovespa de forma consistente ao longo dos anos. Aliando conhecimento profundo de mercado com uma abordagem fundamentalista, Gustavo traz o lado estratégico da jogada — indicando momentos ideais de movimentar peças e proteger o patrimônio.
- Otávio Augusto Ferrari Pedro, por sua vez, é especialista em investimentos e cientista de dados. Ele desenvolveu redes neurais e algoritmos quantitativos capazes de antecipar tendências de mercado, adicionando um componente de precisão e inteligência às decisões de investimento. Para Otávio, dados e estatística são os pilares que refinam cada passo no “tabuleiro” do mercado financeiro.

Juntos, unimos o olhar criterioso de um analista certificado que sabe quando e como se defender com a perspectiva inovadora de um cientista de dados que consegue antecipar cenários e encontrar oportunidades. É o roque transportado para o universo dos investimentos: uma proteção eficaz do capital aliada ao posicionamento estratégico para buscar ganhos acima dos índices.

A Castling oferece mais do que relatórios — oferecemos tranquilidade, confiança e ferramentas avançadas para quem quer agir com inteligência e segurança no mercado financeiro. Assim como no xadrez, cada movimentação é planejada para combinar defesa e ataque, garantindo que nossos clientes estejam sempre um passo à frente.

Name: Smart Franchise Investing
Description:
Most people investigating franchising are doing so for the first time and have little to no knowledge about franchising. With over 3,500 franchise brands in the U.S., it’s almost impossible for those new to franchising to determine what franchises are worthwhile and which are going to be the right fit for them. Selecting the right franchise could make the difference between success and financial disaster. Why take such a risk without professional guidance?

There’s so much to consider when selecting, investigating, and evaluating various franchise opportunities. Working with a franchise expert enables you to not only fast-track the steep franchise learning curve but also helps you avoid making the myriad of common mistakes that people make when being “sold” a franchise. We don’t sell franchises. We leverage our industry knowledge spanning 30 years in franchising, educate our clients on the proper due diligence when buying a franchise, help our clients identify those franchises best suited to help them achieve their goals and provide sound franchise consulting throughout the process. We don’t believe in pressuring clients; we would rather earn their trust and truly help them make the smartest decision possible when investing in a franchise.

We’ve developed an effective and streamlined process for clients to identify those franchises that are the “right fit” for them. We interview clients to understand their skills, abilities, talents, and what’s “driving” their interest in going into business. We take a deep dive into their goals and the outcome they would like to create. Most importantly, we educate them about the different types of franchises and participate in a highly collaborative discussion to identify their preferences regarding business models and industries. Through this process, we make specific franchise recommendations based on data and logic.

Name: Maalbeck Befektetési Tanácsadó Kft
Description:
Ahhoz, hogy el tudjuk érni céljainkat, nem csak a saját munkánkra, de támogató környezetre is szükségünk van. A környezet azonban sokszor nem támogat, néha olyan kihívásokat támaszt elénk, amelyek legyőzése nem igazán könnyű feladat.

A kihívások ugyanakkor lehetőségeket is jelentenek. Attól függ, honnan nézzük.

A Maalbeck Befektetési Tanácsadó Kft. küldetése, hogy az előttünk álló kihívásokat segítsen lehetőséggé fordítani ügyfelei számára.

Segíteni szeretnénk.

A Maalbeck Befektetési Tanácsadó Kft. kollégái elmélyült tudással rendelkeznek a befektetési piacokról, a befektetési lehetőségekről és a piaci kockázatokról. Kollégáinkat több, mint 20 éves szakmai tapasztalatuk segíti az Önök számára legjobb lehetséges megoldások megtalálásában. A Maalbeck Befektetési Tanácsadó Kft. a PFN-Prestige Financial Zrt. további közvetítő partnere, tevékenységét a befektetési szolgáltatókról szóló 2007. évi CXXXVIII. törvény (Bszt.) előírásaival összhangban, a Magyar Nemzeti Bank engedélyével végzi.

A PFN-Prestige Financial Zrt. prémium szolgáltatása 5 millió forinttól elérhető az ügyfelek számára. A PFN-Prestige Financial Zrt. az Erste Bank függő ügynöke.

Name: Defai GmbH
Description:
We help investors in AI with 

1. early due diligence, 
2. AI training of investment team members, 
3. deploying AI and other software in operations of data driven investors, and 
4. other advisory services, including advising portfolio companies.

Early AI due diligence

We provide early due diligence in the form of knowledge empowerment for investors.  We would prefer NOT to give a thumbs up or down to any venture.  Rather, we would describe the factors that should play into our clients' own investment decision making.

As much as possible these factors would be in investor language, but details are important.  In order to communicate those details for a complex and hyped space like AI applied to even more complex, vertical domains, we would recommend that clients invest in 5-6 well-trodden, AI training sessions with us.  Most deals require collaborating with other vertical domain experts  for holistic evaluation.  Typically, these early due diligence efforts take 1-4 days.  Verbal feedback to determine the need for written reports can help optimize time.

Asset verification, such as code reviews, in later stages of due diligence is out of scope.

AI Training

The content in these sessions is current and was originally developed in 2016. It cuts across the latest hot and fashionable trends in AI to give deep intuition using simple algebra and human analogies.  In other words, your investment in these sessions would bring returns as long as AI imparts investable virtues to deals - hardness, uniqueness and defensibility.

Investor Operations

AI can play a pivotal role in deal flow productivity for investor team members, and we can help.  

While external AI services can be used for many use cases, confidentiality is critical.  The safest and personalized approach is to also deploy custom AI in-house for the most data-driven impact.   Fortunately, open-source Gen AI provides a path to do this.

Name: EFFE Capital
Description:
Alguns nomes carregam significados.
Outros os constroem.

A EFFE Capital nasceu da ideia de que finanças não são sobre números, mas sobre sentido.
Cada decisão deve ter propósito, estrutura e direção.
Por isso, o nome EFFE carrega em si quatro pilares que definem nossa forma de pensar, agir e construir valor:
Estratégia, Fundamento, Foco e Equilíbrio.

Estratégia é o olhar adiante, a capacidade de compreender o contexto, antecipar movimentos e construir direção em meio à incerteza.

Fundamento é a raiz, o conhecimento técnico, o rigor ético e a solidez que sustentam cada decisão.

Foco é o eixo, a clareza de propósito que mantém o essencial no centro, preservando coerência e sentido.

Equilíbrio é o estado ideal, onde razão e propósito se encontram, garantindo continuidade, serenidade e legado.

Esses princípios não são apenas palavras, são a arquitetura que sustenta tudo o que fazemos.
Guiam a forma como analisamos riscos, estruturamos decisões e conduzimos relações de longo prazo.

A EFFE Capital é uma empresa de inteligência financeira e gestão patrimonial independente, conectada aos principais players do mercado global, preservando total independência e ausência de conflitos de interesse.
Atuamos como um family office moderno, combinando análise profunda, visão estratégica e ética inegociável.

Nosso propósito é simples e essencial: proteger, crescer e perpetuar grandes patrimônios, com a consciência de que o verdadeiro valor está em evoluir com propósito, sem abrir mão dos princípios e valores que nos norteiam e em que acreditamos.

Porque o capital é meio, não fim.
O que permanece não é apenas volume, é legado.
E legado se constrói com Estratégia, Fundamento, Foco e Equilíbrio.

Ensemble, nous transformons notre passion pour les entreprises et l'investissement en une opportunité de croissance et de succès sur les marchés financiers. Prêt à nous rejoindre ? "

Name: CYNTHEAN CAPITAL
Description:
At Cynthean Capital, we always stress that investing inherently involves risk. Our approach isn’t about promising guaranteed returns, but about building long-term wealth with what you’re able to risk.

Crucially, we prioritize understanding our clients’ emotional and psychological states. We recognize that market fluctuations can be unsettling, and we work closely with you to manage expectations, navigate volatility, and maintain a disciplined, long-term perspective—ensuring your investment plan aligns with your comfort level and emotional resilience.

At Cynthean Capital, we also focus on helping those in underserved communities. Many may say financial knowledge is everywhere, leaving no excuse for people not to know about building wealth.

What’s missing is the understanding of the language of investing. I can read an article in Spanish, but I can guarantee you I wouldn’t have a clue what it’s saying. Investing can feel the same way.

Cynthean Capital helps break that language barrier down.

So, whether you want to start investing with a small amount or something larger, Cynthean Capital can walk you through it—at no cost.

For the time being, Cynthean Capital is offering free services. These include Portfolio Management, Risk Management, and Investment Advisory.

In short, Cynthean Capital can build your investment portfolio and then manage it—for free. Simple! Our goal is to aid the community in a way that breaks the cycle of not being prepared for the future.

If you’re ready, send me an email at cyntheancap@gmail.com. Make sure the subject line reads “Q for Cynthean Capital” and ask whatever you want.

Name: Simmonds & Elliott (T/A Invest in Leisure)
Description:
If you are considering buying a holiday home or lodge, then Simmonds & Elliott can provide useful resources and advisory services to help you make more informed investment decisions. 

We offer 1-2-1 consultancy on holiday home investments, we can refer you to an independent financial advisor, or organise a viewing tour of holiday lodges and resorts in your chosen location.

We can organise a viewing tour of holiday lodges and resorts in your chosen location. We will have a discovery call with you to understand your requirements, your preferred locations and the dates you want to visit.

We will liaise with our partners at the different resorts to put an itinerary together for your viewing tour.  We will try and get free or discounted accommodation for you, where possible. (Note: We recommend that where possible, you should visit off-season, as many resorts will give you free accommodation, particularly if you already have finance in place).

If you want to buy in Cornwall then we can also provide the accommodation and base for your viewing tour at our own luxury 3-bed holiday barn at Retallack Resort and Spa, near Newquay and Padstow).  We are only able to offer accommodation during the off-peak season, as we have a few weeks reserved for friends and family.

Contact us now, if you would like us to organise a booking tour on your behalf, or if you would like to rent our lodge.

Name: AGX CAPITAL
Description:
A AGX Capital é uma empresa especializada em consultoria de investimentos em renda variável, dedicada a atender tanto investidores iniciantes quanto aqueles com maior experiência no mercado. Nosso propósito é oferecer não apenas orientação técnica, mas também capacitar o investidor para que possa tomar decisões assertivas e estratégicas na alocação de seu capital.

O cenário financeiro atual exige conhecimento aprofundado, análise criteriosa e acompanhamento constante das tendências de mercado. Nesse contexto, a AGX Capital se destaca por oferecer um portfólio diversificado de serviços, que abrange consultoria em ações, fundos de investimento imobiliário (FIIs), stocks, Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs), exchange-traded funds (ETFs) e asset alocation. Complementamos essa atuação com serviços de declaração de imposto de renda para investidores, consultoria financeira, análise de dados, research, planejamento tributário e suporte no ativo descentralizado, o Bitcoin, incluindo o estudo de estratégias, compreensão da tecnologia blockchain e orientação sobre setups de autocustódia.

Nosso compromisso é alinhar as estratégias de investimento aos objetivos individuais de cada cliente. Para isso, consideramos fatores essenciais, como o perfil de risco, a situação financeira atual e as metas de curto, médio e longo prazo. Assim, conseguimos propor soluções personalizadas que buscam maximizar resultados, preservar patrimônio e proporcionar segurança nas decisões.

Dessa forma, a AGX Capital se posiciona como parceira estratégica no processo de construção e gestão de investimentos, unindo conhecimento técnico, análise de mercado e foco nas necessidades de cada investidor para transformar objetivos em resultados concretos.

Description:
شرکت والا سرمایه به عنوان یک نهاد مالی تخصصی فعالیت خود را از سال 1400 آغاز کرده است. این شرکت یکی از شرکت های توابع هولدینگ والا تجارت بوده که تمرکز خود را بر ارائه خدمات مشاوره مالی و سرمایه گذاری در سطح استاندارد های بین المللی گمارده است.
رسالت شرکت والا سرمایه ایجاد بستری امن و کم ریسک برای سرمایه گذاران و علاقه مندان ورود به عرصه جذاب بازارهای مالی است. برای تحقق این امر خطیر تمام تخصص و تجربه تیم خود را بکار گرفته ایم و طی یک فرآیند کاملاً اصولی و مبتنی بر پارامترهای بین المللی از ابتدا در کنار سرمایه گذارانی که والا سرمایه را انتخاب می کنند، خواهیم بود.
ما در والا سرمایه با تکیه بر سال ها تجربه فعالیت مان در زمینه بازارهای مالی داخلی و جهانی و همچنین نیروهای متخصصی که بکار گرفته ایم، گام به گام در کنار شما خواهیم بود و تمام توان تخصصی و دانش خود را بکار گرفته ایم تا بهترین شرایط سرمایه گذاری و سبد گردانی را مهیا سازیم و تیب خاطری برای سرمایه گذاران خود فراهم کنیم.
در کنار خدمات مشاوره مالی و سرمایه گذاری، به جهت رسالت اجتماعی ای که بر دوش خود حس می کنیم، بر خود لازم می دانیم تجارب و دانش متخصصان مان را بر اساس چهارچوبی مشخص و معین به علاقه مندان و تحلیل گران بازارهای مالی منتقل کنیم تا سهمی در پیشرفت سطح علمی فعالین این حوزه داشته باشیم.
این مجموعه با بکار گیری تمام ظرفیت های ذکر شده در تلاش است تا برای طیف وسیعی از علاقه مندان به فعالیت در بازارهای مالی، شرایط را محیا سازد تا هر یک با توجه به تمایل و گرایش خود، مطابق با استاندارد های اصولی مدنظر، فعالیت خود را آغاز کرده و اطمینان حاصل کنند که تیمی حرفه ای و طبق متد های بروز آموزشی در تمام طول مسیر آموزش در کنار آنان خواهد بود.

L'attività di O2e ha preso avvio con il contributo alla fondazione e al supporto del Campus Superpartes a Brescia, ideato da Gianfausto Ferrari. Subito dopo, O2e ha giocato un ruolo chiave nel primo round di investimento di Talent Garden, contribuendo alla creazione della Tag Innovation School e Tag Med.

Tra le altre iniziative promosse da O2e vi sono l'Olivetti Day e il lancio della Digital Universitas. Nel 2012, O2e ha anche contribuito alla fondazione di Alkemy Spa tramite l'iniziativa TSC Talent Solutions for Cloud.

Negli anni, O2e si è impegnata attivamente come angel investor e venture capital, sostenendo oltre 30 progetti di startup, tra cui TAG, Weroad, AWMS, Azzurro Digitale, The FabLab, Epicode e Tannico.

Nuestro enfoque se basa en establecer alianzas estratégicas con un portafolio selecto de colaboradores, lo que nos permite ofrecer un amplio espectro de servicios financieros adaptados a las necesidades específicas de cada empresa.

En KAPI, entendemos que cada negocio tiene requerimientos financieros únicos y cambiantes, por lo que nos esforzamos en desarrollar relaciones sólidas con nuestros clientes para comprender a fondo sus metas y desafíos. Con un equipo altamente capacitado y experimentado en diversas áreas financieras, ofrecemos asesoramiento experto y soluciones a medida que ayudan a nuestros clientes a alcanzar sus objetivos y optimizar sus operaciones.

Nuestra empresa se destaca por su enfoque personalizado y orientado al cliente, donde la transparencia y la confidencialidad son valores fundamentales. Trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con nuestros clientes para identificar oportunidades de crecimiento, optimizar la estructura de capital, mejorar el flujo de efectivo y minimizar los riesgos financieros.

Al establecer alianzas estratégicas con una red selecta de aliados, podemos ofrecer a nuestros clientes una amplia gama de soluciones financieras, que incluyen descuento de facturas (factoring), trade finance, forwards, seguro de crédito, y mucho más.

En KAPI, nos enorgullece nuestra capacidad para generar resultados tangibles y agregar valor a nuestros clientes. Siempre nos esforzamos por superar las expectativas y construir relaciones a largo plazo basadas en la confianza y el éxito compartido.

Si está buscando una consultoría financiera confiable y orientada al éxito, no dude en contactarnos. Estamos listos para ayudarlo a alcanzar nuevos niveles de excelencia financiera.

Name: Nivex Capital Limited
Description:
Who We Are
Nivex Capital Limited is an independent investment advisory boutique based in London, with a major focus on the Italian market. We specialize in alternative investment strategies across Europe, offering expert origination, structuring, and execution of high-value investment opportunities for a global network of institutional investors, banks, and family offices.

What We Do
At Nivex Capital, we focus on origination and investment advisory services tailored to dynamic and high-potential sectors, with a particular emphasis on Italy. Our expertise spans across several key sectors:

- Real Estate: Identifying and structuring attractive real estate investments in the Italian market, delivering sustainable value and returns for investors.
- Public Sector Receivables: We are uniquely positioned to capitalize on opportunities in receivables towards public administration, with a special focus on healthcare receivables. Our deep understanding of the Italian market and regulatory environment enables us to identify and structure transactions in this niche but highly lucrative sector.
- Non-Performing Loans (NPL): Advising on distressed debt, non-performing loans, and unlikely-to-pay loans, allowing clients to unlock significant value from distressed situations in Italy and across Europe.
- Special Situations: Crafting bespoke strategies for complex investment opportunities, including distressed assets and unique financial scenarios requiring specialized advisory and execution.

Name: GLA Patrimonio
Description:
En un mundo financiero saturado de ruido y opciones confusas, en GLA Patrimonio SL creemos que tu dinero merece una estrategia clara, transparente y diseñada a tu medida.

Somos asesores financieros independientes que trabajan sin ataduras con partners a nivel mundial, lo que nos permite seleccionar entre los mejores productos y gestoras del mundo para ofrecerte una planificación sólida, rentable y segura.

Nuestra filosofía es simple:
 Proteger lo que has construido.
 Hacer crecer tu patrimonio de forma consistente.
 Acompañarte en cada etapa de tu vida financiera.
 Claridad y transparencia en los costes del servicio.

¿Cómo lo hacemos?
	•	Metales preciosos físicos como activo refugio ante la inflación y la volatilidad.
	•	Fondos de inversión indexados y activos, seleccionados de las gestoras más prestigiosas a nivel global.
	•	Alternativas de inversión exclusivas y diversificadas para optimizar el rendimiento.
	•	Estrategias de ahorro inteligente, adaptadas a tus objetivos y perfil de riesgo.

No creemos en fórmulas mágicas ni promesas imposibles. Creemos en la educación financiera, en que entiendas dónde está tu dinero, por qué está ahí y qué puedes esperar de él.

En GLA Patrimonio, trabajamos para que tu patrimonio no solo crezca, sino que lo haga con propósito y dirección.
Queremos que tengas la libertad de elegir tu futuro sin que las decisiones financieras sean un obstáculo.

Nuestra misión: ayudarte a tomar decisiones informadas para que tu dinero trabaje tan duro como tú.
Nuestra visión: ser tu socio financiero de confianza, hoy y siempre.

Name: Fractal Wealthtech
Description:
Nós somos uma Wealthtech especializada em aplicar estratégias de Engenharia Financeira Aplicada à Gestão Patrimonial e de Ciência da Computação Aplicada ao Mercado Financeiro. 

A Engenharia Financeira estuda o mercado financeiro sob uma ótica disruptiva em relação ao mercado tradicional, observando oportunidades exóticas de lucratividade significativamente superior a Índices de Referência ou Benchmarks, sobretudo o Selic (nossas Carteiras de Investimento de Renda Fixa rendem, em média, 120% a 150% da Selic) e o S&P500 (nossas Carteiras de Renda Variável rendem, em média, 250% a 300% da S&P500).

Na Ciência da Computação, focamos em automatizar processos laborais do mercado financeiro, garantindo analise de mais dados por unidade de tempo do que um profissional normal do mercado financeiro, e que as decisões serão tomadas segundo Prospectos e estratégias bem definidas, reduzindo, eficientemente, o componente emocional muitas vezes maléfico em operações financeiras de viés varíavel com foco em alavancagem patrimonial.

Nossas Carteiras de Investimento alocam capital de diversas fontes e são bastante diversificadas. Em Renda Fixa, nós oferecemos duas Carteiras para Compra de Cotas de Empreendimentos Imobiliários, sendo as Cotas negociadas com as incorporadoras parceiras, Commel Invest e Neoin. Em Renda Variável, temos a Carteira de Posicionamento em Criptomoedas, a Carteira para Arbitragem de Estatística com Criptomoedas, a Carteira de Participação em Pools de Liquidez e outras três Carteiras exclusivas aos nossos clientes de Consultoria e às nossas Parcerias B2B (Carteira de Posicionamento em FIIs, Carteira de Posicionamento em Ações e Carteira para Troca de Ações).

Nossos principais focos são: rentabilizar os ativos normalmente adquiridos, como Ações ou Criptomoedas, de modo que esses ativos sirvam para geração de renda passiva, enquanto o investidor faz o holding tradicional do ativo; e fazer alavancagem patrimonial com estratégias de Day Trade e Swing Trade.

Name: RoAr Investimentos
Description:
A Roar Investimentos é uma boutique independente especializada na estruturação, gestão e distribuição de produtos financeiros com lastro real, governança sólida e impacto mensurável. Atuamos na interseção entre capital, sustentabilidade e inovação, conectando investidores qualificados a oportunidades exclusivas que unem performance financeira e propósito ambiental.

Nosso portfólio combina inteligência financeira, rigor técnico e visão estratégica de longo prazo. Entre nossos principais produtos, destacam-se os Fundos de Investimento em Cadeias do Agronegócio (FIAGROs) e as CPRs Verdes — títulos de crédito rural vinculados à preservação ambiental, que transformam serviços ambientais em valor econômico e promovem a monetização de ativos sustentáveis.

Com uma abordagem institucional e sob os mais altos padrões de compliance e governança, a Roar Investimentos atua em parceria com gestoras, administradoras e agentes estruturadores para oferecer soluções completas de investimento verde. Nossos produtos são desenhados para family offices, assets, wealth managers e investidores profissionais que buscam diversificação, segurança e impacto positivo.

Acreditamos que o futuro dos investimentos está na convergência entre rentabilidade e responsabilidade. Por isso, cada operação estruturada pela Roar carrega não apenas valor financeiro, mas também um compromisso real com a descarbonização da economia, a preservação de ecossistemas e o fortalecimento da governança sustentável no Brasil.

Roar Investimentos — onde o capital encontra propósito.

Name: Second Degré Patrimoine
Description:
Conseils et Formation en création et gestion de patrimoine - Stratégie patrimoniale - Immobilier - Placements financiers - Fiscalité.

Fort de 18 années passées à travailler dans divers secteurs de la construction puis de la promotion immobilière, j'ai décidé de mettre à profit mes compétences en réorientant ma carrière vers un domaine passionnant : L'accompagnement et le conseil des particuliers dans la création, la gestion et la transmission de leur patrimoine. 

Ce secteur, bien que fondamental pour mes clients, est méconnu, bien trop souvent sous-estimé, voire totalement ignoré au beau milieu de leurs vies bien remplies. On ne nous apprend pas à constituer un patrimoine. On ne nous accompagne pas à le développer, et encore moins à le transmettre.

Il est très commun de se réveiller un jour en se disant qu'on aurait dû faire tel ou tel investissement, qu'on aurait dû préparer le financement des études des enfants, qu'on aurait dû préparer sa retraite pour palier à la chute de ses revenus, ou qu'on n'a pas du tout anticipé la transmission de notre patrimoine, exposant nos proches à une lourde fiscalité lors d'un décès. C’est malheureux ! Tout cela était faisable, mais le travail passait avant tout...

La bonne nouvelle, c'est qu'il n'est jamais trop tard pour commencer. Dans ce domaine, le temps joue en votre faveur. Plus on commence tôt, plus c'est intéressant et plus les possibilités qui s'offrent à vous sont nombreuses. Si le temps vient à manquer, il est toujours temps de corriger le tir, et d'optimiser ce qui peut l'être.

Si vous souhaitez faire le point sur votre situation, élaborer une stratégie patrimoniale en adéquation avec vos objectifs à moyen et long termes, être conseillés et accompagnés dans la réalisation d'investissements dans l'immobilier (LMNP, PINEL, MALRAUX, Déficit Foncier) ou des placements financiers (Assurance vie, SCPI, FCPI, FIP, Girardin Industriel, etc.) ou si vous voulez optimiser votre fiscalité, contactez un professionnel.

Name: Just Transition Investment Alliance
Description:
An investor led platform, for green technology and energy customers seeking to procure finished green goods from African Just Transition Green Industrial Cities, predominantly located in places dependent on mining and highly carbon intensive industries. 

The initiative will commence with the establishment of a Just Transition Procurement Champions Community (JTPCC) of 500 Multinational corporations (MNCs) and African Large companies, from across commercial and industrial sectors, non-profit organizations, Aid organizations, as well as other buying agencies. operating globally and across the continent.

The Just Transition Investors Alliance (JTIA), is built on an overarching theory of change that institutional investors as universal owners, investee company corporates as customers and MDB’s, regional banks and development finance institutions, as private capital credit enhancers, have a pivotal role to play in positively influencing Africa’s Just Energy Transition and equitable and increased participation in global value chains for ‘finished goods’ and green technologies, and to assist African and global policymakers, to prioritize institutional investor- public partnerships (IIPP’s) to accelerate that process.

After 10 years operating under the name “MCSA Monte Carlo Projetos Econômico-Financeiros”, building our reputation in the design and delivery of services in banking regulation, payment systems, exchange trading, PUMA metrics, and — since 2024 — in portfolio management for high-net-worth investors, wealth management, and ultra-personalized family services in Brazil and abroad, we now take a decisive step: we officially launch operations as “Monte Carlo Multi Family Office.”

Our evolution reflects the maturity of work that has always been guided by technical excellence, independence, and a complete alignment of interests with our clients. Becoming a formal Multi Family Office allows us to broaden the scope of solutions we offer, with robust governance, institutional processes, and the infrastructure required to present ourselves as a “Comprehensive Boutique of Specialized Financial Services.”

More than managing wealth, our mission is to transform complexity into clarity, assets into legacy, and relationships into lasting partnerships. We speak to clients in plain, transparent language — in Portuguese or in their native tongue — virtually “drawing” financial concepts, market jargon, and economic principles so that they are easy to understand and inspire confidence in our approach. We remain committed to delivering tailor-made service, consolidating positions in Brazil and, now, internationally, integrating investment strategies, succession planning, and tax efficiency — all within a single global vision. As always, we make a point of emphasizing that we are not tied to any financial institution and can work with all financial providers both in Brazil and abroad.

With "Monte Carlo Multi Family Office", we reaffirm our commitment to stand beside every client — preserving

Name: LifeTechverse
Description:
The Capital Market is designed to increase the gap between the rich and poor. Furthermore, it is vulnerable to fraud and manipulation by corporations, groups or individuals.

Limited transparency often leads people to invest based on assumptions that prove untrue and lead to losses. In addition, a person’s natural resources (activities, time and money) are limited but often undervalued or not valued at all. LifeTechverse believes that a return on investments in form of power enables Capitalism to control the market. Which in turn leads to the misallocation of limited resources and controls the distribution of wealth.

LifeTechverse is a digital wealth platform that enables a revolutionary form of investment that will create a fair return on human activities and monetary investments through asset-backed NFTs, leaving the capital market behind. We call this concept “maximising the productivity and value of human productivity by creating intrinsic value of their limited natural resources”

By using Non-fungible Tokens (NFTs), the LifeTechverse platform will allow businesses or private investors to create additional revenue streams, reward and value their own and their employee’s resources and generate cashflow boosts without using traditional ways such as bank loans or private equity.

Name: Love for Life GOLD
Description:
La consulenza etico-patrimoniale con il collocamento in oro è un servizio offerto da esperti finanziari che si concentrano su investimenti responsabili e sostenibili nel settore dell'oro. Questo tipo di consulenza tiene conto sia degli aspetti finanziari che di quelli etici nella scelta degli investimenti.

L'oro è da lungo tempo considerato un bene rifugio, in quanto può mantenere o aumentare il suo valore nel tempo, soprattutto in periodi di incertezza economica. Tuttavia, l'industria dell'oro è stata associata a problemi come il lavoro minorile, lo sfruttamento delle risorse e l'inquinamento ambientale. La consulenza etico-patrimoniale mira a identificare e promuovere investimenti in oro che siano conformi a criteri etici e sostenibili.

Durante una consulenza etico-patrimoniale con il collocamento in oro, il consulente finanziario lavora a stretto contatto con il cliente per comprendere i suoi obiettivi finanziari e i valori etici. Vengono esaminati diversi aspetti, come l'origine dell'oro, le pratiche di estrazione, la trasparenza delle catene di approvvigionamento e l'impatto ambientale e sociale delle società coinvolte.

Il consulente identifica quindi opportunità di investimento in società minerarie o produttori di oro che si adattano ai criteri etici del cliente. Ciò può includere società che adottano pratiche sostenibili, come l'utilizzo di tecnologie più pulite, il rispetto dei diritti umani e delle normative ambientali, nonché il coinvolgimento delle comunità locali.

Durante il processo di consulenza, vengono fornite informazioni approfondite sulle società raccomandate e sui rischi associati agli investimenti in oro. Il consulente aiuta il cliente a prendere decisioni informate in base alle sue preferenze etiche e al suo profilo di rischio.

È importante sottolineare che gli investimenti in oro possono comportare rischi finanziari, come fluttuazioni dei prezzi e volatilità di mercato.

Name: Nbimone
Description:
Norway’s oil fund, or the Government Pension Fund Global which is its official name, was created after we discovered oil in the North Sea. The fund was set up to shield the economy from ups and downs in oil revenue. It also serves as a financial reserve and as a long-term savings plan so that both current and future generations get to benefit from our oil wealth.
In 1969, one of the world’s largest offshore oilfields was discovered off Norway. Suddenly we had a lot of oil to sell, and the country’s economy grew dramatically. It was decided early on that revenue from oil and gas should be used cautiously in order to avoid imbalances in the economy. In 1990, the Norwegian parliament passed legislation to support this, creating what is now the Government Pension Fund Global, and the first money was deposited in the fund in 1996. As the name suggests, it was decided that the fund should only be invested abroad.  

Oil revenue has been very important for Norway, but one day the oil will run out. The aim of the fund is to ensure that we use this money responsibly, think long-term and so safeguard the future of the Norwegian economy.

Name: Save Your Money
Description:
Naši klienti jsou úspěšní ve svých oborech a naším úkolem je jejich úspěch proměnit v jejich majetek. Jsme investoři, kteří vidí nutnost tvorby majetku. Naším účelem je pomoci co největšímu počtu lidí, aby si vytvořili dostatečný majetek a jednou z cest je investovat. Proto naším hlavním produktem je tvorba portfolia, které je přesná skladba aktiv pro klienta a návod, jak portfoliu přistupovat v čase a jak se chovat v jednotlivých situacích, jako jsou třeba výběry prostředků, nebo mimořádné vklady.

V další fázi je naším úkolem správně portfolio spravovat tak, aby klientovi jeho majetek v čase rostl. Vzhledem k našim zkušenostem, co by investorů, je naše vize hlavně udržitelnosti a dlouhodobosti. Proto naše klienty učíme, že chtít vydělat moc příliš rychle je většinou spíše nebezpečné. Cílem investora nejsou nesmysly jako garantované zhodnocení 30 % ročně, ale udržitelný růst a to také investory učíme. O portfolia se tedy pravidelně staráme a hlídáme jejich složení. Náš zakladatel nám jednou řekl, že radši bude mít 7% zhodnocení, než aby měl příslib 30% zisků a potom si musel znovu vydělávat i svoji původní investici.

V neposlední řadě jsme zastánci fér služby. Na trhu investic, nebo financí si poradci často berou velké vstupní poplatky a to jen za to, že sjednají univerzální smlouvu, kterou nadřízený schválil. Proti těmto poplatkům bojujeme, protože nám přijde fér, být zaplaceni za to, že přineseme hodnotu klientovi. Proto u nás vstupní poplatky neexistují, ale jsme zaplaceni malým podílem na zisku.

Name: Mit4Bizness
Description:
Et si on redonnait du pouvoir à celles et ceux qui croient en vous dès le début ?

Chez Mit4Bizness, nous croyons que l’investissement dans l’entrepreneuriat ne doit pas être réservé à une élite, une institution ou organisation. Nos proches, amis, collègues, voisins, réseaux ... sont souvent les premiers à croire en un projet. 

 Notre mission : Mobiliser et valoriser ces micro-investisseurs pour qu’ils deviennent de véritables Micro-Business Angels au service de l’entrepreneuriat. Nous ne collectons, ni ne gérons ou rémunérons les fonds investis.

Mit4Bizness est une plateforme SaaS qui :
 - connecte les porteurs de projets à leur premier cercle d’investisseurs potentiels,
 - accompagne les entrepreneurs dans la structuration de leur levée de fonds,
 - donne des outils aux micro-investisseurs pour leur permettre d’agir de manière éclairée et en toute confiance,
 - collabore avec des organismes agréés pour sécuriser les opérations et lever des fonds,
 - recueille les promesses d’investissement,
 - donne des outils (Reporting/Suivi, etc.) pour suivre, interagir et apporter ces compétences et réseau aux projet.

 Plus qu’une solution tech, Mit4Bizness est un mouvement pour démocratiser l’accès au financement et faire émerger des projets porteurs de sens & un Réseau de Micro-Business Angels de référence.

Nous construisons un écosystème bienveillant et responsable de Micro-Business Angels, où l’argent n’est plus un frein mais un levier collectif.

 Nous ne collectons, ne gérons ni ne rémunérons les fonds investis. Mit4Bizness n’exerce pas d’activité soumise à agrément financier.

 Rejoignez-nous pour réinventer ensemble les codes et former le Réseau de référence de Micro-Business Angels !

Name: BUTTERFLY INVEST
Description:
Butterfly Invest est la première plateforme d’investissement participatif dédiée au développement et à la dynamisation de l’économie locale en Guadeloupe.

Elle est née d’un constat porté par Chrystopher Lalanne, expert reconnu de l’économie guadeloupéenne : chaque année, des projets porteurs de transformation, de création d’emplois et de richesse durable émergent… mais peinent à trouver les financements nécessaires pour se concrétiser (pour des raisons étranges ...).
En parallèle, de nombreux particuliers, indépendants et entrepreneurs souhaiteraient investir localement, afin de soutenir leur territoire et donner du sens à leur argent. Aujourd'hui, c'est plus de 4 milliards d'euros qui dorment sur les comptes des guadeloupéens).

Mais jusqu’ici, aucun cadre structuré, sécurisé et accessible ne leur permettait de le faire efficacement.

Butterfly Invest répond à ce double besoin.

Fruit d’un partenariat avec INVEST IN PACIFIC, société leader de l’investissement participatif dans les Outre-mer, agréée en tant que Prestataire de Services de Financement Participatif (PSFP) sous le numéro FP 2024-02, la plateforme permet d’investir directement dans des projets locaux solides, concrets et ambitieux.

Notre mission est simple et puissante :
Faire circuler l’argent localement, entre les mains de celles et ceux qui veulent – et peuvent – faire bouger la Guadeloupe.

Avec Butterfly Invest, nous ouvrons l’accès à des opportunités d’investissement solides et concrètes à toutes celles et ceux qui cherchent à faire fructifier leur argent, mais aussi donner du sens dans leurs investissements.

Notre ambition : construire un véritable écosystème d’investissement citoyen, durable et engagé, au service de la réussite collective en Guadeloupe.

Notre mission

Chez How We Rent, notre mission est de rendre l’investissement immobilier accessible, efficace et rentable pour tous. Que vous soyez un particulier qui souhaite acheter son premier bien pour commencer à générer des revenus, ou un investisseur expérimenté avec un portefeuille important, notre approche vous accompagne à chaque étape pour maximiser la performance de vos biens.

Son constat est simple : de nombreux investisseurs débutants ou particuliers souhaitent se lancer dans l’immobilier, mais manquent de support, de méthodologie et d’accès à une expertise de haut niveau. À l’inverse, même les investisseurs expérimentés peuvent parfois bénéficier d’un accompagnement stratégique pour optimiser leurs portefeuilles et exploiter pleinement les leviers de distribution et de revenue management.

Name: ACCE Investments
Description:
ACCE INVESTMENTS
Independent Thematic Equity Research

I publish institutional-grade analysis on the global megatrends reshaping markets — delivered as ready-to-implement equity baskets for serious retail investors.

WHAT WE DO

Most investment research stops at narratives ("AI is huge") or noise ("this stock moved today"). ACCE Investments goes end-to-end:

→ Signal identification: Separate structural trends from cyclical noise through earnings analysis, capital flows, and competitive dynamics

→ Rigorous valuation: Range-based thinking (bear/base/bull) with explicit assumptions and transparent methodology

→ Portfolio construction: Complete thematic baskets with specific allocations, entry strategies, and rebalancing rules

CURRENT THEMES

- AI Infrastructure (semiconductors, equipment, platforms)
- GLP-1 Ecosystem (obesity therapeutics and value chain)
- Defense & Aerospace (geopolitical tailwinds, multi-year budgets)
- Datacenter Power & Cooling (overlooked AI bottleneck)
- Expanding to 8-10 themes over 18 months

WHAT YOU GET

Paid subscribers receive:
✓ Complete equity baskets with full position disclosure
✓ Weekly market intelligence on all active themes
✓ Quarterly institutional deep-dives (12-15 hours of research)
✓ Real-time performance tracking vs. S&P 500
✓ Stock-by-stock rationale with bull/bear/base cases

PHILOSOPHY

Evidence over opinion. Slow research, not hot takes. No conflicts of interest, no sponsored positions. Transparency on what would change our view.

This is buy-side research written for capital allocation decisions, not content marketing.

WHO THIS IS FOR

→ Self-directed investors managing $100K+ portfolios
→ Finance professionals seeking thematic exposure
→ Anyone tired of free summaries masquerading as research

CURRENT PRICING

Founding members (first 100): $79/month or $779/year
Standard pricing after: $99/month or $999/year

Name: IIPPHub
Description:
The IIPP Hub is the official platform showcasing Institutional Investor-Public Partnerships (IIPPs).

Pioneered by Australian and Canadian specialised pension fund infrastructure investment platforms, the IIPP model was commonly referred to as the ‘Pensions-Public Partnerships’ model. The African Unions’ 5% institutional infrastructure investment agenda initiative adapted this and expanded it to include sovereign wealth funds and the broader institutional investment community, creating the first-of-its-kind, Institutional Investor Public-Partnership and Model Law Framework. Its purpose being to assist and equip emerging markets and developing countries to de-risk infrastructure investment in order to better meet their climate and infrastructure development private capital mobilisation goals.

IIPPs uniquely bring on board citizen-driven domestic investors (i.e., in the pension funds which are the institutional investors) as catalytic participants in domestic and international infrastructure assets. This is an innovative approach to creating partnerships between institutional investors (IIs) and governments.

IIPPs are a proven method of mobilising large pools of long-term, patient capital to invest in the development and maintenance of large-scale infrastructure assets for governments whose budgets are no longer able to finance these assets in the traditional fashion.

IIPPs were designed to align public finance and institutional investor mandates by unlocking and helping to deploy private operational and project development expertise and long-term institutional capital at scale, to well-structured, de-risked infrastructure assets around the globe, in partnership with governments.

IIPPs help to ensure that the investible assets meet their full potential. They seek to ensure projects are delivered on time and on budget and that they receive the required ongoing investment to ensure they are regularly and properly maintained.

Blue Marlin Advisors LLC is an investment boutique that offers both active and smart-passive investment and smart-active trading strategies for private and institutional clients.

As a Registered Investment Advisor, we have a fiduciary duty to put our clients’ best interests first and adhere to principles and standards as set forth by the regulatory governing bodies.

The three founders bring expertise in many areas and work well to design and implement a strategic portfolio for you. Our combined long-standing experience in global financial markets has taught us that there is always a bull market and a bear market somewhere. Likewise, there are always avoidable traps.

However, avoiding market traps that can otherwise lead to scathing portfolio drawdowns means having a repeatable process that on an ongoing basis adjusts the portfolios to current market reality.

At Blue Marlin Advisors we believe the average client portfolio does not have to lose 50% each time the economy runs into a recession or stocks experience a bear market. We also know that strategic planning can even continue to see solid results in less than ideal market conditions.

A proactive, repeatable process to the markets over time should allow portfolios to significantly outperform the outdated ‘blindly buy and hold come hell or high water’ approach that in the industry sadly is still being applied to the majority of client portfolios.

Our clients come from all stages of life and all backgrounds; From retirees to young families, to institutional investors such as family offices and beyond.

A Brasilità nasceu de um sonho simples, mas desafiador: tornar possível para brasileiros realizarem o desejo de ter um imóvel na Itália, de forma clara, segura e acessível.

Percebemos que muitos desistiam no meio do caminho diante da burocracia, da falta de informações confiáveis e das diferenças culturais. Description:

Nos Services :

Investissement Immobilier :

Immobilier Classique : Nous aidons nos clients à investir dans des biens résidentiels et commerciaux, favorisant la valorisation du capital à long terme.
Investissement Locatif : Nous guidons nos clients dans l'acquisition de biens destinés à la location, générant ainsi des revenus passifs.

Défiscalisation :

Nous proposons des dispositifs fiscaux avantageux .Permettant de réduire l'imposition tout en investissant.


Placements Financiers :

Plan d'Épargne Retraite (PER) : Un produit d'épargne pour préparer la retraite avec des avantages fiscaux.
Assurance Vie : Un outil d'épargne flexible et performant, idéal pour constituer un capital à long terme.
Assurance Emprunteur : Protection de votre prêt immobilier en cas d'imprévu.
Notre Engagement :
Chez Le Chêne Patrimonial, nous croyons en l'importance d'un accompagnement personnalisé. Notre équipe d'experts est à l'écoute de vos besoins et vous guide à chaque étape de votre projet, afin de bâtir un avenir financier solide et durable.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour discuter de vos projets d'investissement et découvrir comment nous pouvons vous aider à atteindre vos objectifs patrimoniaux.
